Page Design  The 'BookstoreOnline' web application will consist of the following nine pages:  ### 1. Dashboard Page - **Page Title**: Bookstore Dashboard - **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured books, bestsellers, and quick navigation to all functionalities. - **Elements**:   - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.   - **ID: featured-books** - Type: Div - Display of featured book recommendations.   - **ID: browse-catalog-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book catalog page.   - **ID: view-cart-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to shopping cart page.   - **ID: bestsellers-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to bestsellers page.  ### 2. Shopping Cart Page - **Page Title**: Shopping Cart - **Overview**: A page displaying items in the cart with quantity management and checkout option. - **Elements**:   - **ID: cart-page** - Type: Div - Container for the cart page.   - **ID: cart-items-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying cart items with title, quantity, price, and subtotal.   - **ID: update-quantity-{item_id}** - Type: Input (number) - Field to update item quantity (each cart item has this).   - **ID: remove-item-button-{item_id}** - Type: Button - Button to remove item from cart (each cart item has this).   - **ID: proceed-checkout-button** - Type: Button - Button to proceed to checkout.   - **ID: total-amount** - Type: Div - Display total cart amount.  ### 5. Checkout Page - **Page Title**: Checkout - **Overview**: A page for users to enter shipping information and complete purchase. - **Elements**:   - **ID: checkout-page** - Type: Div - Container for the checkout page.   - **ID: customer-name** - Type: Input - Field to input customer name.   - **ID: shipping-address** - Type: Textarea - Field to input shipping address.   - **ID: payment-method** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select payment method (Credit Card, PayPal, Bank Transfer).   - **ID: place-order-button** - Type: Button - Button to confirm and place order.  ### 6. Order History Page - **Page Title**: Order History - **Overview**: A page displaying all previous orders with tracking information. - **Elements**:   - **ID: orders-page** - Type: Div - Container for the orders page.   - **ID: orders-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying orders with order ID, date, total amount, and status.   - **ID: view-order-button-{order_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view order details (each order has this).   - **ID: order-status-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by status (All, Pending, Shipped, Delivered).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 7. Reviews Page - **Page Title**: Customer Reviews - **Overview**: A page displaying all customer reviews and allowing users to write new reviews. - **Elements**:   - **ID: reviews-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reviews page.   - **ID: reviews-list** - Type: Div - List of all reviews with book title, rating, and review text.   - **ID: write-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to write review page.   - **ID: filter-by-rating** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter reviews by rating (All, 5 stars, 4 stars, etc.).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 8. Write Review Page - **Page Title**: Write a Review - **Overview**: A page for users to write reviews for purchased books. - **Elements**:   - **ID: write-review-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write review page.   - **ID: select-book** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select book to review.   - **ID: rating-select** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select rating (1-5 stars).   - **ID: review-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write review text.   - **ID: submit-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit review.  ### 9. Bestsellers Page - **Page Title**: Bestsellers - **Overview**: A page displaying top-selling books ranked by sales. - **Elements**:   - **ID: bestsellers-page** - Type: Div - Container for the bestsellers page.   - **ID: bestsellers-list** - Type: Div - Ranked list of bestselling books with rank, title, author, and sales count.   - **ID: time-period-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by time period (This Week, This Month, All Time).   - **ID: view-book-button-{book_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view book details (each bestseller has this).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ## 4. Data Storage  The 'BookstoreOnline' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:  ### 1. Books Data - **File Name**: `books.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   book_id|title|author|isbn|category|price|stock|description   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|The Great Gatsby|F. Scott Fitzgerald|9780743273565|Fiction|12.99|50|A classic American novel   2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|9780062316097|Non-Fiction|16.99|30|A brief history of humankind   3|1984|George Orwell|9780451524935|Fiction|14.99|45|Dystopian social science fiction   ```  ### 2. Categories Data - **File Name**: `categories.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   category_id|category_name|description   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|Fiction|Fictional narratives and novels   2|Non-Fiction|Factual and educational books   3|Science|Scientific topics and research   ```  ### 3. Cart Data - **File Name**: `cart.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   cart_id|book_id|quantity|added_date   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|1|2|2025-01-15   2|3|1|2025-01-16   ```  ### 4. Orders Data - **File Name**: `orders.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   order_id|customer_name|order_date|total_amount|status|shipping_address   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|John Doe|2025-01-10|38.97|Delivered|123 Main St, New York, NY 10001   2|Jane Smith|2025-01-14|16.99|Shipped|456 Oak Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90001   ```  ### 5. Order Items Data - **File Name**: `order_items.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   order_item_id|order_id|book_id|quantity|price   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|1|1|2|12.99   2|1|3|1|14.99   3|2|2|1|16.99   ```  ### 6. Reviews Data - **File Name**: `reviews.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   review_id|book_id|customer_name|rating|review_text|review_date   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Amazing book! A true classic.|2025-01-12   2|2|Bob Williams|4|Very informative and well-written.|2025-01-13   3|3|Charlie Brown|5|Thought-provoking and relevant today.|2025-01-15   ```  ### 7. Bestsellers Data - **File Name**: `bestsellers.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   book_id|sales_count|period   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   2|150|This Month   1|120|This Month   3|95|This Month   ```

Cart\n- **Path:** `/cart`\n- **Function Name:** `cart`\n- **HTTP Methods:** `GET`, `POST`\n- **Template Rendered:** `cart.html`\n- **Variables:**\n  - `cart_items`: List of items with quantity, price, subtotal.\n  - `total_amount`: Total price.\n- **Description:** Display cart contents.\n  - Forms/buttons to update quantity per item.\n  - Button with id `proceed-checkout-button` to proceed checkout.\n\n### 5. Checkout\n- **Path:** `/checkout`\n- **Function Name:** `checkout`\n- **HTTP Methods:** `GET`, `POST`\n- **Template Rendered:** `checkout.html`\n- **Variables:** None\n- **Description:** Form to input customer name, shipping address, and payment method (dropdown). \n  - Confirm button submits order.\n\n### 6. Order History\n- **Path:** `/history`\n- **Function Name:** `history`\n- **HTTP Methods:** `GET`\n- **Template Rendered:** `history.html`\n- **Variables:**\n  - `orders`: List of user orders with order date, total, status.\n- **Description:** Displays previous orders with detail buttons.\n  - Dropdown filter by order status.\n\n### 7. Reviews List\n- **Path:** `/reviews`\n- **Function Name:** `reviews`\n- **HTTP Methods:** `GET`\n- **Template Rendered:** `reviews.html`\n- **Variables:**\n  - `reviews`: List of reviews.\n  - `rating_filter`: Filter rating selected.\n- **Description:** Displays customer reviews with filters by star rating.\n  - Back to dashboard button.\n\n### 8. Write Review\n- **Path:** `/write_review`\n- **Function Name:** `write_review`\n- **HTTP Methods:** `GET`, `POST`\n- **Template Rendered:** `write_review.html`\n- **Variables:**\n  - `books`: List of purchased books for dropdown.\n- **Description:** Form to submit a review with dropdown `select-book`, rating selector (1-5), and text.\n\n### 9. Bestsellers\n- **Path:** `/bestsellers`\n- **Function Name:** `bestsellers`\n- **HTTP Methods:** `GET`, `POST`\n- **Template Rendered:** `bestsellers.html`\n- **Variables:**\n  - `bestsellers`: List of books ranked by sales.\n  - `time_period`: Selected filter period.\n- **Description:** Displays ranked bestselling books, filterable by time period.\n  - Buttons to view book details.\n\n## Section 2: HTML Templates\n\n### 1. dashboard.html (templates/dashboard.html)\n- **Purpose:** Home page with navigation buttons.\n- **Elements:**\n  - `div#dashboard-page`: Main container for dashboard.\n  - `button#browse-catalog-button`: Button to navigate to `/catalog`.\n  - `button#view-cart-button`: Button to navigate to `/cart`.\n\n### 2. catalog.html (templates/catalog.html)\n- **Purpose:** Display and filter/search book catalog.\n- **Elements:**\n  - `input#search-box` (text input): Search books by title or author.\n  - `select#category-filter`: Dropdown to select category filter.\n  - For each book:\n    - `div.book-item`: Container showing cover (if any), title, author, price.\n    - `button#view-book-button-{book_id}`: Button to view detailed page.\n\n### 3. details.html (templates/details.html)\n- **Purpose:** Show book details.\n- **Elements:**\n  - `div#book-details-page`: Container.\n  - `h1#book-title`: Book title.\n  - `div#book-author`: Book author.\n  - `div#book-description`: Description text.\n  - `button#add-to-cart-button`: Add book to cart.\n\n### 4. cart.html (templates/cart.html)\n- **Purpose:** Show cart items and facilitate quantity update and checkout.\n- **Elements:**\n  - Table/list with cart items: title, quantity (with input), price, subtotal.\n  - Update quantity buttons/forms per item.\n  - `button#proceed-checkout-button`: Button to proceed to checkout.\n  - Display total amount.\n\n### 5. checkout.html (templates/checkout.html)\n- **Purpose:** Form to complete purchase.\n- **Elements:**\n  - `div#checkout-page`: Container.\n  - `input#customer-name`: Text field for customer.\n  - `textarea#shipping-address`: Shipping address input.\n  - `select#payment-method`: Dropdown (e.g., \"Credit Card\", \"Bank Transfer\").\n  - Confirm button submits form.\n\n### 6. history.html (templates/history.html)\n- **Purpose:** Show past orders.\n- **Elements:**\n  - List/table of orders: date, total amount, status.\n  - Dropdown to filter by order status.\n  - Detail buttons for each order.\n  - Button `back-to-dashboard` to return.\n\n### 7. reviews.html (templates/reviews.html)\n- **Purpose:** Show customer reviews.\n- **Elements:**\n  - `div#reviews-page`: Container.\n  - Reviews list with rating stars, review text, date.\n  - Dropdown to filter by stars.\n  - Button `back-to-dashboard`.\n\n### 8. write_review.html (templates/write_review.html)\n- **Purpose:** Form for submitting book review.\n- **Elements:**\n  - `div#write-review-page`: Container.\n  - `select#select-book`: Dropdown of purchased books.\n  - `select#rating`: Dropdown from 1 to 5.\n  - `textarea#review-text`: Text input area.\n  - Submit button to post review.\n\n### 9. bestsellers.html (templates/bestsellers.html)\n- **Purpose:** Show bestselling books ranked.\n- **Elements:**\n  - `div#bestsellers-page`: Container.\n  - List of rank, title, sales count.\n  - `select#time-period-filter`: Dropdown for Month, Year, All Time.\n  - Each book has a details button.\n  - Button `back-to-dashboard`.\n\nAll navigation buttons use `url_for()` for links and forms where applicable.\n\n## Section 3: Data File Specifications\n\n### 1. books.txt\n- **Path:** `data/books.txt`\n- **Fields:** \n  - Scott Fitzgerald|9780743273565|1|10.99|15|Classic social novel.\n  ```\n\n### 2. categories.txt\n- **Path:** `data/categories.txt`\n- **Fields:** \n  - `category_id` (int), `category_name` (str), `description` (str)\n- **Description:** Categories for books.\n- **Example:**\n  ```\n  1|Fiction|Fictional novels\n  2|Non-Fiction|Educational and factual\n  3|Science|Scientific and research texts\n  ```\n\n### 3. orders.txt\n- **Path:** `data/orders.txt`\n- **Fields:**\n  - `order_id` (int), `customer_name` (str), `order_date` (date yyyy-mm-dd), `total_amount` (float), `status` (str), `shipping_address` (str)\n- **Description:** Customer order records.\n- **Example:**\n  ```\n  1|John Doe|2025-01-16|59.97|Pending|123 Main St, Los Angeles\n  ```\n\n### 4. order_items.txt\n- **Path:** `data/order_items.txt`\n- **Fields:**\n  - `order_item_id` (int), `order_id` (int), `book_id` (int), `quantity` (int), `price_each` (float)\n- **Description:** Items included in each order.\n- **Example:**\n  ```\n  1|1|3|2|19.99\n  ```\n\n### 5. reviews.txt\n- **Path:** `data/reviews.txt`\n- **Fields:**\n  - `review_id` (int), `book_id` (int), `customer_name` (str), `rating` (int 1-5), `review_text` (str), `review_date` (date yyyy-mm-dd)\n- **Description:** Customer reviews.\n- **Example:**\n  ```\n  5|2|Alice|5|Amazing book! A classic.|2025-01-12\n  ```\n\n### 6. bestsellers.txt\n- **Path:** `data/bestsellers.txt`\n- **Fields:**\n  - `rank` (int), `book_id` (int), `sales` (int), `period` (str)\n- **Description:** Ranked bestsellers by period.\n- **Example:**\n  ```\n  1|2|150|Month\n  3|5|95|Month\n  ```\n\n---\n\nThis specification covers all Flask routes with route details, frontend HTML template element IDs and roles, and the data file schemas with example data lines."})

# Requirements Document for 'BookstoreOnline' Web Application

## 1. Objective
Develop a comprehensive web application named 'BookstoreOnline' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse books, add items to cart, checkout, write reviews, and track order history. No authentication required - all features are directly accessible. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.

## 2. Language
The required development language for the 'BookstoreOnline' application is Python.

## 3. Page Design

The 'BookstoreOnline' web application will consist of the following nine pages:

### 1. Dashboard Page
- **Page Title**: Bookstore Dashboard
- **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured books, bestsellers, and quick navigation to all functionalities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.
  - **ID: featured-books** - Type: Div - Display of featured book recommendations.
  - **ID: browse-catalog-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book catalog page.
  - **ID: view-cart-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to shopping cart page.
  - **ID: bestsellers-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to bestsellers page.

### 2. Book Catalog Page
- **Page Title**: Book Catalog
- **Overview**: A page displaying all available books with search and filter capabilities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: catalog-page** - Type: Div - Container for the catalog page.
  - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search books by title, author, or ISBN.
  - **ID: category-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by category (Fiction, Non-Fiction, Science, History, etc.).
  - **ID: books-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying book cards with cover, title, author, and price.
  - **ID: view-book-button-{book_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view book details (each book card has this).

### 3. Book Details Page
- **Page Title**: Book Details
- **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific book.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: book-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the book details page.
  - **ID: book-title** - Type: H1 - Display book title.
  - **ID: book-author** - Type: Div - Display book author.
  - **ID: book-price** - Type: Div - Display book price.
  - **ID: add-to-cart-button** - Type: Button - Button to add book to shopping cart.
  - **ID: book-reviews** - Type: Div - Section displaying customer reviews.

### 4. Shopping Cart Page
- **Page Title**: Shopping Cart
- **Overview**: A page displaying items in the cart with quantity management and checkout option.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: cart-page** - Type: Div - Container for the cart page.
  - **ID: cart-items-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying cart items with title, quantity, price, and subtotal.
  - **ID: update-quantity-{item_id}** - Type: Input (number) - Field to update item quantity (each cart item has this).
  - **ID: remove-item-button-{item_id}** - Type: Button - Button to remove item from cart (each cart item has this).
  - **ID: proceed-checkout-button** - Type: Button - Button to proceed to checkout.
  - **ID: total-amount** - Type: Div - Display total cart amount.

### 5. Checkout Page
- **Page Title**: Checkout
- **Overview**: A page for users to enter shipping information and complete purchase.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: checkout-page** - Type: Div - Container for the checkout page.
  - **ID: customer-name** - Type: Input - Field to input customer name.
  - **ID: shipping-address** - Type: Textarea - Field to input shipping address.
  - **ID: payment-method** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select payment method (Credit Card, PayPal, Bank Transfer).
  - **ID: place-order-button** - Type: Button - Button to confirm and place order.

### 6. Order History Page
- **Page Title**: Order History
- **Overview**: A page displaying all previous orders with tracking information.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: orders-page** - Type: Div - Container for the orders page.
  - **ID: orders-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying orders with order ID, date, total amount, and status.
  - **ID: view-order-button-{order_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view order details (each order has this).
  - **ID: order-status-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by status (All, Pending, Shipped, Delivered).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 7. Reviews Page
- **Page Title**: Customer Reviews
- **Overview**: A page displaying all customer reviews and allowing users to write new reviews.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: reviews-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reviews page.
  - **ID: reviews-list** - Type: Div - List of all reviews with book title, rating, and review text.
  - **ID: write-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to write review page.
  - **ID: filter-by-rating** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter reviews by rating (All, 5 stars, 4 stars, etc.).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 8. Write Review Page
- **Page Title**: Write a Review
- **Overview**: A page for users to write reviews for purchased books.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: write-review-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write review page.
  - **ID: select-book** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select book to review.
  - **ID: rating-select** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select rating (1-5 stars).
  - **ID: review-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write review text.
  - **ID: submit-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit review.

### 9. Bestsellers Page
- **Page Title**: Bestsellers
- **Overview**: A page displaying top-selling books ranked by sales.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: bestsellers-page** - Type: Div - Container for the bestsellers page.
  - **ID: bestsellers-list** - Type: Div - Ranked list of bestselling books with rank, title, author, and sales count.
  - **ID: time-period-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by time period (This Week, This Month, All Time).
  - **ID: view-book-button-{book_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view book details (each bestseller has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

## 4. Data Storage

The 'BookstoreOnline' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:

### 1. Books Data
- **File Name**: `books.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  book_id|title|author|isbn|category|price|stock|description
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|The Great Gatsby|F. Scott Fitzgerald|9780743273565|Fiction|12.99|50|A classic American novel
  2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|9780062316097|Non-Fiction|16.99|30|A brief history of humankind
  3|1984|George Orwell|9780451524935|Fiction|14.99|45|Dystopian social science fiction
  ```

### 2. Categories Data
- **File Name**: `categories.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  category_id|category_name|description
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Fiction|Fictional narratives and novels
  2|Non-Fiction|Factual and educational books
  3|Science|Scientific topics and research
  ```

### 3. Cart Data
- **File Name**: `cart.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  cart_id|book_id|quantity|added_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|2|2025-01-15
  2|3|1|2025-01-16
  ```

### 4. Orders Data
- **File Name**: `orders.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  order_id|customer_name|order_date|total_amount|status|shipping_address
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|John Doe|2025-01-10|38.97|Delivered|123 Main St, New York, NY 10001
  2|Jane Smith|2025-01-14|16.99|Shipped|456 Oak Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90001
  ```

### 5. Order Items Data
- **File Name**: `order_items.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  order_item_id|order_id|book_id|quantity|price
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|1|2|12.99
  2|1|3|1|14.99
  3|2|2|1|16.99
  ```

### 6. Reviews Data
- **File Name**: `reviews.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  review_id|book_id|customer_name|rating|review_text|review_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Amazing book! A true classic.|2025-01-12
  2|2|Bob Williams|4|Very informative and well-written.|2025-01-13
  3|3|Charlie Brown|5|Thought-provoking and relevant today.|2025-01-15
  ```

### 7. Bestsellers Data
- **File Name**: `bestsellers.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  book_id|sales_count|period
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  2|150|This Month
  1|120|This Month
  3|95|This Month
  ```


  [Agent Output] === design_spec.md ===

=== LLM_call: SystemArchitect_SelfReflect ===
INPUT: === Original Task ===
Create detailed design_spec.md covering Flask routes, HTML templates, and data schemas for BookstoreOnline as specified in user_task_description
=== user_task_description ===

# Requirements Document for 'BookstoreOnline' Web Application

## 1. Objective
Develop a comprehensive web application named 'BookstoreOnline' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse books, add items to cart, checkout, write reviews, and track order history. No authentication required - all features are directly accessible. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.

## 2. Language
The required development language for the 'BookstoreOnline' application is Python.

## 3. Page Design

The 'BookstoreOnline' web application will consist of the following nine pages:

### 1. Dashboard Page
- **Page Title**: Bookstore Dashboard
- **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured books, bestsellers, and quick navigation to all functionalities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.
  - **ID: featured-books** - Type: Div - Display of featured book recommendations.
  - **ID: browse-catalog-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book catalog page.
  - **ID: view-cart-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to shopping cart page.
  - **ID: bestsellers-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to bestsellers page.

### 2. Book Catalog Page
- **Page Title**: Book Catalog
- **Overview**: A page displaying all available books with search and filter capabilities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: catalog-page** - Type: Div - Container for the catalog page.
  - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search books by title, author, or ISBN.
  - **ID: category-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by category (Fiction, Non-Fiction, Science, History, etc.).
  - **ID: books-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying book cards with cover, title, author, and price.
  - **ID: view-book-button-{book_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view book details (each book card has this).

### 3. Book Details Page
- **Page Title**: Book Details
- **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific book.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: book-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the book details page.
  - **ID: book-title** - Type: H1 - Display book title.
  - **ID: book-author** - Type: Div - Display book author.
  - **ID: book-price** - Type: Div - Display book price.
  - **ID: add-to-cart-button** - Type: Button - Button to add book to shopping cart.
  - **ID: book-reviews** - Type: Div - Section displaying customer reviews.

### 4. Shopping Cart Page
- **Page Title**: Shopping Cart
- **Overview**: A page displaying items in the cart with quantity management and checkout option.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: cart-page** - Type: Div - Container for the cart page.
  - **ID: cart-items-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying cart items with title, quantity, price, and subtotal.
  - **ID: update-quantity-{item_id}** - Type: Input (number) - Field to update item quantity (each cart item has this).
  - **ID: remove-item-button-{item_id}** - Type: Button - Button to remove item from cart (each cart item has this).
  - **ID: proceed-checkout-button** - Type: Button - Button to proceed to checkout.
  - **ID: total-amount** - Type: Div - Display total cart amount.

### 5. Checkout Page
- **Page Title**: Checkout
- **Overview**: A page for users to enter shipping information and complete purchase.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: checkout-page** - Type: Div - Container for the checkout page.
  - **ID: customer-name** - Type: Input - Field to input customer name.
  - **ID: shipping-address** - Type: Textarea - Field to input shipping address.
  - **ID: payment-method** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select payment method (Credit Card, PayPal, Bank Transfer).
  - **ID: place-order-button** - Type: Button - Button to confirm and place order.

### 6. Order History Page
- **Page Title**: Order History
- **Overview**: A page displaying all previous orders with tracking information.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: orders-page** - Type: Div - Container for the orders page.
  - **ID: orders-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying orders with order ID, date, total amount, and status.
  - **ID: view-order-button-{order_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view order details (each order has this).
  - **ID: order-status-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by status (All, Pending, Shipped, Delivered).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 7. Reviews Page
- **Page Title**: Customer Reviews
- **Overview**: A page displaying all customer reviews and allowing users to write new reviews.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: reviews-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reviews page.
  - **ID: reviews-list** - Type: Div - List of all reviews with book title, rating, and review text.
  - **ID: write-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to write review page.
  - **ID: filter-by-rating** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter reviews by rating (All, 5 stars, 4 stars, etc.).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 8. Write Review Page
- **Page Title**: Write a Review
- **Overview**: A page for users to write reviews for purchased books.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: write-review-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write review page.
  - **ID: select-book** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select book to review.
  - **ID: rating-select** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select rating (1-5 stars).
  - **ID: review-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write review text.
  - **ID: submit-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit review.

### 9. Bestsellers Page
- **Page Title**: Bestsellers
- **Overview**: A page displaying top-selling books ranked by sales.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: bestsellers-page** - Type: Div - Container for the bestsellers page.
  - **ID: bestsellers-list** - Type: Div - Ranked list of bestselling books with rank, title, author, and sales count.
  - **ID: time-period-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by time period (This Week, This Month, All Time).
  - **ID: view-book-button-{book_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view book details (each bestseller has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

## 4. Data Storage

The 'BookstoreOnline' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:

### 1. Books Data
- **File Name**: `books.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  book_id|title|author|isbn|category|price|stock|description
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|The Great Gatsby|F. Scott Fitzgerald|9780743273565|Fiction|12.99|50|A classic American novel
  2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|9780062316097|Non-Fiction|16.99|30|A brief history of humankind
  3|1984|George Orwell|9780451524935|Fiction|14.99|45|Dystopian social science fiction
  ```

### 2. Categories Data
- **File Name**: `categories.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  category_id|category_name|description
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Fiction|Fictional narratives and novels
  2|Non-Fiction|Factual and educational books
  3|Science|Scientific topics and research
  ```

### 3. Cart Data
- **File Name**: `cart.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  cart_id|book_id|quantity|added_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|2|2025-01-15
  2|3|1|2025-01-16
  ```

### 4. Orders Data
- **File Name**: `orders.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  order_id|customer_name|order_date|total_amount|status|shipping_address
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|John Doe|2025-01-10|38.97|Delivered|123 Main St, New York, NY 10001
  2|Jane Smith|2025-01-14|16.99|Shipped|456 Oak Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90001
  ```

### 5. Order Items Data
- **File Name**: `order_items.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  order_item_id|order_id|book_id|quantity|price
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|1|2|12.99
  2|1|3|1|14.99
  3|2|2|1|16.99
  ```

### 6. Reviews Data
- **File Name**: `reviews.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  review_id|book_id|customer_name|rating|review_text|review_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Amazing book! A true classic.|2025-01-12
  2|2|Bob Williams|4|Very informative and well-written.|2025-01-13
  3|3|Charlie Brown|5|Thought-provoking and relevant today.|2025-01-15
  ```

### 7. Bestsellers Data
- **File Name**: `bestsellers.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  book_id|sales_count|period
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  2|150|This Month
  1|120|This Month
  3|95|This Month
  ```

=== user_task_description ===

# Requirements Document for 'BookstoreOnline' Web Application

## 1. Objective
Develop a comprehensive web application named 'BookstoreOnline' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse books, add items to cart, checkout, write reviews, and track order history. No authentication required - all features are directly accessible. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.

## 2. Language
The required development language for the 'BookstoreOnline' application is Python.

## 3. Page Design

The 'BookstoreOnline' web application will consist of the following nine pages:

### 1. Dashboard Page
- **Page Title**: Bookstore Dashboard
- **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured books, bestsellers, and quick navigation to all functionalities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.
  - **ID: featured-books** - Type: Div - Display of featured book recommendations.
  - **ID: browse-catalog-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book catalog page.
  - **ID: view-cart-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to shopping cart page.
  - **ID: bestsellers-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to bestsellers page.

### 2. Book Catalog Page
- **Page Title**: Book Catalog
- **Overview**: A page displaying all available books with search and filter capabilities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: catalog-page** - Type: Div - Container for the catalog page.
  - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search books by title, author, or ISBN.
  - **ID: category-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by category (Fiction, Non-Fiction, Science, History, etc.).
  - **ID: books-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying book cards with cover, title, author, and price.
  - **ID: view-book-button-{book_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view book details (each book card has this).

### 3. Book Details Page
- **Page Title**: Book Details
- **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific book.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: book-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the book details page.
  - **ID: book-title** - Type: H1 - Display book title.
  - **ID: book-author** - Type: Div - Display book author.
  - **ID: book-price** - Type: Div - Display book price.
  - **ID: add-to-cart-button** - Type: Button - Button to add book to shopping cart.
  - **ID: book-reviews** - Type: Div - Section displaying customer reviews.

### 4. Shopping Cart Page
- **Page Title**: Shopping Cart
- **Overview**: A page displaying items in the cart with quantity management and checkout option.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: cart-page** - Type: Div - Container for the cart page.
  - **ID: cart-items-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying cart items with title, quantity, price, and subtotal.
  - **ID: update-quantity-{item_id}** - Type: Input (number) - Field to update item quantity (each cart item has this).
  - **ID: remove-item-button-{item_id}** - Type: Button - Button to remove item from cart (each cart item has this).
  - **ID: proceed-checkout-button** - Type: Button - Button to proceed to checkout.
  - **ID: total-amount** - Type: Div - Display total cart amount.

### 5. Checkout Page
- **Page Title**: Checkout
- **Overview**: A page for users to enter shipping information and complete purchase.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: checkout-page** - Type: Div - Container for the checkout page.
  - **ID: customer-name** - Type: Input - Field to input customer name.
  - **ID: shipping-address** - Type: Textarea - Field to input shipping address.
  - **ID: payment-method** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select payment method (Credit Card, PayPal, Bank Transfer).
  - **ID: place-order-button** - Type: Button - Button to confirm and place order.

### 6. Order History Page
- **Page Title**: Order History
- **Overview**: A page displaying all previous orders with tracking information.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: orders-page** - Type: Div - Container for the orders page.
  - **ID: orders-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying orders with order ID, date, total amount, and status.
  - **ID: view-order-button-{order_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view order details (each order has this).
  - **ID: order-status-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by status (All, Pending, Shipped, Delivered).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 7. Reviews Page
- **Page Title**: Customer Reviews
- **Overview**: A page displaying all customer reviews and allowing users to write new reviews.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: reviews-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reviews page.
  - **ID: reviews-list** - Type: Div - List of all reviews with book title, rating, and review text.
  - **ID: write-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to write review page.
  - **ID: filter-by-rating** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter reviews by rating (All, 5 stars, 4 stars, etc.).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 8. Write Review Page
- **Page Title**: Write a Review
- **Overview**: A page for users to write reviews for purchased books.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: write-review-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write review page.
  - **ID: select-book** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select book to review.
  - **ID: rating-select** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select rating (1-5 stars).
  - **ID: review-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write review text.
  - **ID: submit-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit review.

### 9. Bestsellers Page
- **Page Title**: Bestsellers
- **Overview**: A page displaying top-selling books ranked by sales.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: bestsellers-page** - Type: Div - Container for the bestsellers page.
  - **ID: bestsellers-list** - Type: Div - Ranked list of bestselling books with rank, title, author, and sales count.
  - **ID: time-period-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by time period (This Week, This Month, All Time).
  - **ID: view-book-button-{book_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view book details (each bestseller has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

## 4. Data Storage

The 'BookstoreOnline' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:

### 1. Books Data
- **File Name**: `books.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  book_id|title|author|isbn|category|price|stock|description
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|The Great Gatsby|F. Scott Fitzgerald|9780743273565|Fiction|12.99|50|A classic American novel
  2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|9780062316097|Non-Fiction|16.99|30|A brief history of humankind
  3|1984|George Orwell|9780451524935|Fiction|14.99|45|Dystopian social science fiction
  ```

### 2. Categories Data
- **File Name**: `categories.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  category_id|category_name|description
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Fiction|Fictional narratives and novels
  2|Non-Fiction|Factual and educational books
  3|Science|Scientific topics and research
  ```

### 3. Cart Data
- **File Name**: `cart.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  cart_id|book_id|quantity|added_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|2|2025-01-15
  2|3|1|2025-01-16
  ```

### 4. Orders Data
- **File Name**: `orders.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  order_id|customer_name|order_date|total_amount|status|shipping_address
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|John Doe|2025-01-10|38.97|Delivered|123 Main St, New York, NY 10001
  2|Jane Smith|2025-01-14|16.99|Shipped|456 Oak Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90001
  ```

### 5. Order Items Data
- **File Name**: `order_items.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  order_item_id|order_id|book_id|quantity|price
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|1|2|12.99
  2|1|3|1|14.99
  3|2|2|1|16.99
  ```

### 6. Reviews Data
- **File Name**: `reviews.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  review_id|book_id|customer_name|rating|review_text|review_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Amazing book! A true classic.|2025-01-12
  2|2|Bob Williams|4|Very informative and well-written.|2025-01-13
  3|3|Charlie Brown|5|Thought-provoking and relevant today.|2025-01-15
  ```

### 7. Bestsellers Data
- **File Name**: `bestsellers.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  book_id|sales_count|period
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  2|150|This Month
  1|120|This Month
  3|95|This Month
  ```

INPUT: === Original Task ===
Create detailed design_spec.md covering Flask routes, HTML templates, and data schemas for BookstoreOnline as specified in user_task_description
=== user_task_description ===

# Requirements Document for 'BookstoreOnline' Web Application

## 1. Objective
Develop a comprehensive web application named 'BookstoreOnline' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse books, add items to cart, checkout, write reviews, and track order history. No authentication required - all features are directly accessible. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.

## 2. Language
The required development language for the 'BookstoreOnline' application is Python.

## 3. Page Design

The 'BookstoreOnline' web application will consist of the following nine pages:

### 1. Dashboard Page
- **Page Title**: Bookstore Dashboard
- **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured books, bestsellers, and quick navigation to all functionalities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.
  - **ID: featured-books** - Type: Div - Display of featured book recommendations.
  - **ID: browse-catalog-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book catalog page.
  - **ID: view-cart-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to shopping cart page.
  - **ID: bestsellers-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to bestsellers page.

### 2. Book Catalog Page
- **Page Title**: Book Catalog
- **Overview**: A page displaying all available books with search and filter capabilities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: catalog-page** - Type: Div - Container for the catalog page.
  - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search books by title, author, or ISBN.
  - **ID: category-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by category (Fiction, Non-Fiction, Science, History, etc.).
  - **ID: books-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying book cards with cover, title, author, and price.
  - **ID: view-book-button-{book_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view book details (each book card has this).

### 3. Book Details Page
- **Page Title**: Book Details
- **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific book.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: book-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the book details page.
  - **ID: book-title** - Type: H1 - Display book title.
  - **ID: book-author** - Type: Div - Display book author.
  - **ID: book-price** - Type: Div - Display book price.
  - **ID: add-to-cart-button** - Type: Button - Button to add book to shopping cart.
  - **ID: book-reviews** - Type: Div - Section displaying customer reviews.

### 4. Shopping Cart Page
- **Page Title**: Shopping Cart
- **Overview**: A page displaying items in the cart with quantity management and checkout option.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: cart-page** - Type: Div - Container for the cart page.
  - **ID: cart-items-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying cart items with title, quantity, price, and subtotal.
  - **ID: update-quantity-{item_id}** - Type: Input (number) - Field to update item quantity (each cart item has this).
  - **ID: remove-item-button-{item_id}** - Type: Button - Button to remove item from cart (each cart item has this).
  - **ID: proceed-checkout-button** - Type: Button - Button to proceed to checkout.
  - **ID: total-amount** - Type: Div - Display total cart amount.

### 5. Checkout Page
- **Page Title**: Checkout
- **Overview**: A page for users to enter shipping information and complete purchase.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: checkout-page** - Type: Div - Container for the checkout page.
  - **ID: customer-name** - Type: Input - Field to input customer name.
  - **ID: shipping-address** - Type: Textarea - Field to input shipping address.
  - **ID: payment-method** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select payment method (Credit Card, PayPal, Bank Transfer).
  - **ID: place-order-button** - Type: Button - Button to confirm and place order.

### 6. Order History Page
- **Page Title**: Order History
- **Overview**: A page displaying all previous orders with tracking information.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: orders-page** - Type: Div - Container for the orders page.
  - **ID: orders-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying orders with order ID, date, total amount, and status.
  - **ID: view-order-button-{order_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view order details (each order has this).
  - **ID: order-status-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by status (All, Pending, Shipped, Delivered).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 7. Reviews Page
- **Page Title**: Customer Reviews
- **Overview**: A page displaying all customer reviews and allowing users to write new reviews.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: reviews-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reviews page.
  - **ID: reviews-list** - Type: Div - List of all reviews with book title, rating, and review text.
  - **ID: write-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to write review page.
  - **ID: filter-by-rating** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter reviews by rating (All, 5 stars, 4 stars, etc.).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 8. Write Review Page
- **Page Title**: Write a Review
- **Overview**: A page for users to write reviews for purchased books.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: write-review-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write review page.
  - **ID: select-book** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select book to review.
  - **ID: rating-select** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select rating (1-5 stars).
  - **ID: review-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write review text.
  - **ID: submit-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit review.

### 9. Bestsellers Page
- **Page Title**: Bestsellers
- **Overview**: A page displaying top-selling books ranked by sales.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: bestsellers-page** - Type: Div - Container for the bestsellers page.
  - **ID: bestsellers-list** - Type: Div - Ranked list of bestselling books with rank, title, author, and sales count.
  - **ID: time-period-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by time period (This Week, This Month, All Time).
  - **ID: view-book-button-{book_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view book details (each bestseller has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

## 4. Data Storage

The 'BookstoreOnline' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:

### 1. Books Data
- **File Name**: `books.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  book_id|title|author|isbn|category|price|stock|description
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|The Great Gatsby|F. Scott Fitzgerald|9780743273565|Fiction|12.99|50|A classic American novel
  2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|9780062316097|Non-Fiction|16.99|30|A brief history of humankind
  3|1984|George Orwell|9780451524935|Fiction|14.99|45|Dystopian social science fiction
  ```

### 2. Categories Data
- **File Name**: `categories.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  category_id|category_name|description
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Fiction|Fictional narratives and novels
  2|Non-Fiction|Factual and educational books
  3|Science|Scientific topics and research
  ```

### 3. Cart Data
- **File Name**: `cart.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  cart_id|book_id|quantity|added_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|2|2025-01-15
  2|3|1|2025-01-16
  ```

### 4. Orders Data
- **File Name**: `orders.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  order_id|customer_name|order_date|total_amount|status|shipping_address
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|John Doe|2025-01-10|38.97|Delivered|123 Main St, New York, NY 10001
  2|Jane Smith|2025-01-14|16.99|Shipped|456 Oak Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90001
  ```

### 5. Order Items Data
- **File Name**: `order_items.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  order_item_id|order_id|book_id|quantity|price
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|1|2|12.99
  2|1|3|1|14.99
  3|2|2|1|16.99
  ```

### 6. Reviews Data
- **File Name**: `reviews.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  review_id|book_id|customer_name|rating|review_text|review_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Amazing book! A true classic.|2025-01-12
  2|2|Bob Williams|4|Very informative and well-written.|2025-01-13
  3|3|Charlie Brown|5|Thought-provoking and relevant today.|2025-01-15
  ```

### 7. Bestsellers Data
- **File Name**: `bestsellers.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  book_id|sales_count|period
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  2|150|This Month
  1|120|This Month
  3|95|This Month
  ```

=== user_task_description ===

# Requirements Document for 'BookstoreOnline' Web Application

## 1. Objective
Develop a comprehensive web application named 'BookstoreOnline' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse books, add items to cart, checkout, write reviews, and track order history. No authentication required - all features are directly accessible. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.

## 2. Language
The required development language for the 'BookstoreOnline' application is Python.

## 3. Page Design

The 'BookstoreOnline' web application will consist of the following nine pages:

### 1. Dashboard Page
- **Page Title**: Bookstore Dashboard
- **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured books, bestsellers, and quick navigation to all functionalities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.
  - **ID: featured-books** - Type: Div - Display of featured book recommendations.
  - **ID: browse-catalog-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book catalog page.
  - **ID: view-cart-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to shopping cart page.
  - **ID: bestsellers-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to bestsellers page.

### 2. Book Catalog Page
- **Page Title**: Book Catalog
- **Overview**: A page displaying all available books with search and filter capabilities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: catalog-page** - Type: Div - Container for the catalog page.
  - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search books by title, author, or ISBN.
  - **ID: category-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by category (Fiction, Non-Fiction, Science, History, etc.).
  - **ID: books-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying book cards with cover, title, author, and price.
  - **ID: view-book-button-{book_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view book details (each book card has this).

### 3. Book Details Page
- **Page Title**: Book Details
- **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific book.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: book-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the book details page.
  - **ID: book-title** - Type: H1 - Display book title.
  - **ID: book-author** - Type: Div - Display book author.
  - **ID: book-price** - Type: Div - Display book price.
  - **ID: add-to-cart-button** - Type: Button - Button to add book to shopping cart.
  - **ID: book-reviews** - Type: Div - Section displaying customer reviews.

### 4. Shopping Cart Page
- **Page Title**: Shopping Cart
- **Overview**: A page displaying items in the cart with quantity management and checkout option.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: cart-page** - Type: Div - Container for the cart page.
  - **ID: cart-items-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying cart items with title, quantity, price, and subtotal.
  - **ID: update-quantity-{item_id}** - Type: Input (number) - Field to update item quantity (each cart item has this).
  - **ID: remove-item-button-{item_id}** - Type: Button - Button to remove item from cart (each cart item has this).
  - **ID: proceed-checkout-button** - Type: Button - Button to proceed to checkout.
  - **ID: total-amount** - Type: Div - Display total cart amount.

### 5. Checkout Page
- **Page Title**: Checkout
- **Overview**: A page for users to enter shipping information and complete purchase.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: checkout-page** - Type: Div - Container for the checkout page.
  - **ID: customer-name** - Type: Input - Field to input customer name.
  - **ID: shipping-address** - Type: Textarea - Field to input shipping address.
  - **ID: payment-method** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select payment method (Credit Card, PayPal, Bank Transfer).
  - **ID: place-order-button** - Type: Button - Button to confirm and place order.

### 6. Order History Page
- **Page Title**: Order History
- **Overview**: A page displaying all previous orders with tracking information.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: orders-page** - Type: Div - Container for the orders page.
  - **ID: orders-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying orders with order ID, date, total amount, and status.
  - **ID: view-order-button-{order_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view order details (each order has this).
  - **ID: order-status-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by status (All, Pending, Shipped, Delivered).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 7. Reviews Page
- **Page Title**: Customer Reviews
- **Overview**: A page displaying all customer reviews and allowing users to write new reviews.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: reviews-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reviews page.
  - **ID: reviews-list** - Type: Div - List of all reviews with book title, rating, and review text.
  - **ID: write-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to write review page.
  - **ID: filter-by-rating** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter reviews by rating (All, 5 stars, 4 stars, etc.).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 8. Write Review Page
- **Page Title**: Write a Review
- **Overview**: A page for users to write reviews for purchased books.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: write-review-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write review page.
  - **ID: select-book** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select book to review.
  - **ID: rating-select** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select rating (1-5 stars).
  - **ID: review-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write review text.
  - **ID: submit-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit review.

### 9. Bestsellers Page
- **Page Title**: Bestsellers
- **Overview**: A page displaying top-selling books ranked by sales.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: bestsellers-page** - Type: Div - Container for the bestsellers page.
  - **ID: bestsellers-list** - Type: Div - Ranked list of bestselling books with rank, title, author, and sales count.
  - **ID: time-period-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by time period (This Week, This Month, All Time).
  - **ID: view-book-button-{book_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view book details (each bestseller has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

## 4. Data Storage

The 'BookstoreOnline' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:

### 1. Books Data
- **File Name**: `books.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  book_id|title|author|isbn|category|price|stock|description
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|The Great Gatsby|F. Scott Fitzgerald|9780743273565|Fiction|12.99|50|A classic American novel
  2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|9780062316097|Non-Fiction|16.99|30|A brief history of humankind
  3|1984|George Orwell|9780451524935|Fiction|14.99|45|Dystopian social science fiction
  ```

### 2. Categories Data
- **File Name**: `categories.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  category_id|category_name|description
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Fiction|Fictional narratives and novels
  2|Non-Fiction|Factual and educational books
  3|Science|Scientific topics and research
  ```

### 3. Cart Data
- **File Name**: `cart.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  cart_id|book_id|quantity|added_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|2|2025-01-15
  2|3|1|2025-01-16
  ```

### 4. Orders Data
- **File Name**: `orders.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  order_id|customer_name|order_date|total_amount|status|shipping_address
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|John Doe|2025-01-10|38.97|Delivered|123 Main St, New York, NY 10001
  2|Jane Smith|2025-01-14|16.99|Shipped|456 Oak Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90001
  ```

### 5. Order Items Data
- **File Name**: `order_items.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  order_item_id|order_id|book_id|quantity|price
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|1|2|12.99
  2|1|3|1|14.99
  3|2|2|1|16.99
  ```

### 6. Reviews Data
- **File Name**: `reviews.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  review_id|book_id|customer_name|rating|review_text|review_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Amazing book! A true classic.|2025-01-12
  2|2|Bob Williams|4|Very informative and well-written.|2025-01-13
  3|3|Charlie Brown|5|Thought-provoking and relevant today.|2025-01-15
  ```

### 7. Bestsellers Data
- **File Name**: `bestsellers.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  book_id|sales_count|period
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  2|150|This Month
  1|120|This Month
  3|95|This Month
  ```

Root Dashboard\n- **Path:** `/`\n- **Function Name:** `dashboard`\n- **HTTP Methods:** `GET`\n- **Template Rendered:** `dashboard.html`\n- **Variables:** None\n- **Description:** Main hub, displays buttons to navigate to catalog page, and view cart.\n\n### 2. Book Catalog\n- **Path:** `/catalog`\n- **Function Name:** `catalog`\n- **HTTP Methods:** `GET`, `POST`\n- **Template Rendered:** `catalog.html`\n- **Variables:**\n  - `books`: List of books filtered/searched.\n  - `categories`: List of categories for filter dropdown.\n  - `selected_category`: Currently filtered category id or None.\n  - `search_query`: Current search string.\n- **Description:** Displays all books with filter and search features.\n  - POST used for filtering by category or searching.\n  - Each book item includes button with id `view-book-button-{book_id}` to view details.\n  - Form includes add to cart button for each book (via details page). \n\n### 3. Book Details\n- **Path:** `/details/<int:book_id>`\n- **Function Name:** `details`\n- **HTTP Methods:** `GET`, `POST`\n- **Template Rendered:** `details.html`\n- **Variables:**\n  - `book`: Book detail dict.\n- **Description:** Shows detailed book info including title, author, price, description.\n  - Button with id `add-to-cart-button` to add book to cart (POST).\n\n### 4. Cart\n- **Path:** `/cart`\n- **Function Name:** `cart`\n- **HTTP Methods:** `GET`, `POST`\n- **Template Rendered:** `cart.html`\n- **Variables:**\n  - `cart_items`: List of items with quantity, price, subtotal.\n  - `total_amount`: Total price.\n- **Description:** Display cart contents.\n  - Forms/buttons to update quantity per item.\n  - Button with id `proceed-checkout-button` to proceed checkout.\n\n### 5. Checkout\n- **Path:** `/checkout`\n- **Function Name:** `checkout`\n- **HTTP Methods:** `GET`, `POST`\n- **Template Rendered:** `checkout.html`\n- **Variables:** None\n- **Description:** Form to input customer name, shipping address, and payment method (dropdown). \n  - Confirm button submits order.\n\n### 6. Order History\n- **Path:** `/history`\n- **Function Name:** `history`\n- **HTTP Methods:** `GET`\n- **Template Rendered:** `history.html`\n- **Variables:**\n  - `orders`: List of user orders with order date, total, status.\n- **Description:** Displays previous orders with detail buttons.\n  - Dropdown filter by order status.\n\n### 7. Reviews List\n- **Path:** `/reviews`\n- **Function Name:** `reviews`\n- **HTTP Methods:** `GET`\n- **Template Rendered:** `reviews.html`\n- **Variables:**\n  - `reviews`: List of reviews.\n  - `rating_filter`: Filter rating selected.\n- **Description:** Displays customer reviews with filters by star rating.\n  - Back to dashboard button.\n\n### 8. Write Review\n- **Path:** `/write_review`\n- **Function Name:** `write_review`\n- **HTTP Methods:** `GET`, `POST`\n- **Template Rendered:** `write_review.html`\n- **Variables:**\n  - `books`: List of purchased books for dropdown.\n- **Description:** Form to submit a review with dropdown `select-book`, rating selector (1-5), and text.\n\n### 9. Bestsellers\n- **Path:** `/bestsellers`\n- **Function Name:** `bestsellers`\n- **HTTP Methods:** `GET`, `POST`\n- **Template Rendered:** `bestsellers.html`\n- **Variables:**\n  - `bestsellers`: List of books ranked by sales.\n  - `time_period`: Selected filter period.\n- **Description:** Displays ranked bestselling books, filterable by time period.\n  - Buttons to view book details.\n\n## Section 2: HTML Templates\n\n### 1. dashboard.html (templates/dashboard.html)\n- **Purpose:** Home page with navigation buttons.\n- **Elements:**\n  - `div#dashboard-page`: Main container for dashboard.\n  - `button#browse-catalog-button`: Button to navigate to `/catalog`.\n  - `button#view-cart-button`: Button to navigate to `/cart`.\n\n### 2. catalog.html (templates/catalog.html)\n- **Purpose:** Display and filter/search book catalog.\n- **Elements:**\n  - `input#search-box` (text input): Search books by title or author.\n  - `select#category-filter`: Dropdown to select category filter.\n  - For each book:\n    - `div.book-item`: Container showing cover (if any), title, author, price.\n    - `button#view-book-button-{book_id}`: Button to view detailed page.\n\n### 3. details.html (templates/details.html)\n- **Purpose:** Show book details.\n- **Elements:**\n  - `div#book-details-page`: Container.\n  - `h1#book-title`: Book title.\n  - `div#book-author`: Book author.\n  - `div#book-description`: Description text.\n  - `button#add-to-cart-button`: Add book to cart.\n\n### 4. cart.html (templates/cart.html)\n- **Purpose:** Show cart items and facilitate quantity update and checkout.\n- **Elements:**\n  - Table/list with cart items: title, quantity (with input), price, subtotal.\n  - Update quantity buttons/forms per item.\n  - `button#proceed-checkout-button`: Button to proceed to checkout.\n  - Display total amount.\n\n### 5. checkout.html (templates/checkout.html)\n- **Purpose:** Form to complete purchase.\n- **Elements:**\n  - `div#checkout-page`: Container.\n  - `input#customer-name`: Text field for customer.\n  - `textarea#shipping-address`: Shipping address input.\n  - `select#payment-method`: Dropdown (e.g., \"Credit Card\", \"Bank Transfer\").\n  - Confirm button submits form.\n\n### 6. history.html (templates/history.html)\n- **Purpose:** Show past orders.\n- **Elements:**\n  - List/table of orders: date, total amount, status.\n  - Dropdown to filter by order status.\n  - Detail buttons for each order.\n  - Button `back-to-dashboard` to return.\n\n### 7. reviews.html (templates/reviews.html)\n- **Purpose:** Show customer reviews.\n- **Elements:**\n  - `div#reviews-page`: Container.\n  - Reviews list with rating stars, review text, date.\n  - Dropdown to filter by stars.\n  - Button `back-to-dashboard`.\n\n### 8. write_review.html (templates/write_review.html)\n- **Purpose:** Form for submitting book review.\n- **Elements:**\n  - `div#write-review-page`: Container.\n  - `select#select-book`: Dropdown of purchased books.\n  - `select#rating`: Dropdown from 1 to 5.\n  - `textarea#review-text`: Text input area.\n  - Submit button to post review.\n\n### 9. bestsellers.html (templates/bestsellers.html)\n- **Purpose:** Show bestselling books ranked.\n- **Elements:**\n  - `div#bestsellers-page`: Container.\n  - List of rank, title, sales count.\n  - `select#time-period-filter`: Dropdown for Month, Year, All Time.\n  - Each book has a details button.\n  - Button `back-to-dashboard`.\n\nAll navigation buttons use `url_for()` for links and forms where applicable.\n\n## Section 3: Data File Specifications\n\n### 1. books.txt\n- **Path:** `data/books.txt`\n- **Fields:** \n  - `book_id` (int), `title` (str), `author` (str), `isbn` (str), `category` (int), `price` (float), `stock` (int), `description` (str)\n- **Description:** Contains all book details.\n- **Example:**\n  ```\n  1|The Great Gatsby|F. Scott Fitzgerald|9780743273565|1|10.99|15|Classic social novel.\n  ```\n\n### 2. categories.txt\n- **Path:** `data/categories.txt`\n- **Fields:** \n  - `category_id` (int), `category_name` (str), `description` (str)\n- **Description:** Categories for books.\n- **Example:**\n  ```\n  1|Fiction|Fictional novels\n  2|Non-Fiction|Educational and factual\n  3|Science|Scientific and research texts\n  ```\n\n### 3. orders.txt\n- **Path:** `data/orders.txt`\n- **Fields:**\n  - `order_id` (int), `customer_name` (str), `order_date` (date yyyy-mm-dd), `total_amount` (float), `status` (str), `shipping_address` (str)\n- **Description:** Customer order records.\n- **Example:**\n  ```\n  1|John Doe|2025-01-16|59.97|Pending|123 Main St, Los Angeles\n  ```\n\n### 4. order_items.txt\n- **Path:** `data/order_items.txt`\n- **Fields:**\n  - `order_item_id` (int), `order_id` (int), `book_id` (int), `quantity` (int), `price_each` (float)\n- **Description:** Items included in each order.\n- **Example:**\n  ```\n  1|1|3|2|19.99\n  ```\n\n### 5. reviews.txt\n- **Path:** `data/reviews.txt`\n- **Fields:**\n  - `review_id` (int), `book_id` (int), `customer_name` (str), `rating` (int 1-5), `review_text` (str), `review_date` (date yyyy-mm-dd)\n- **Description:** Customer reviews.\n- **Example:**\n  ```\n  5|2|Alice|5|Amazing book! A classic.|2025-01-12\n  ```\n\n### 6. bestsellers.txt\n- **Path:** `data/bestsellers.txt`\n- **Fields:**\n  - `rank` (int), `book_id` (int), `sales` (int), `period` (str)\n- **Description:** Ranked bestsellers by period.\n- **Example:**\n  ```\n  1|2|150|Month\n  3|5|95|Month\n  ```\n\n---\n\nThis specification covers all Flask routes with route details, frontend HTML template element IDs and roles, and the data file schemas with example data lines."})

# Requirements Document for 'BookstoreOnline' Web Application

## 1. Objective
Develop a comprehensive web application named 'BookstoreOnline' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse books, add items to cart, checkout, write reviews, and track order history. No authentication required - all features are directly accessible. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.

## 2. Language
The required development language for the 'BookstoreOnline' application is Python.

## 3. Page Design

The 'BookstoreOnline' web application will consist of the following nine pages:

### 1. Dashboard Page
- **Page Title**: Bookstore Dashboard
- **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured books, bestsellers, and quick navigation to all functionalities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.
  - **ID: featured-books** - Type: Div - Display of featured book recommendations.
  - **ID: browse-catalog-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book catalog page.
  - **ID: view-cart-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to shopping cart page.
  - **ID: bestsellers-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to bestsellers page.

### 2. Book Catalog Page
- **Page Title**: Book Catalog
- **Overview**: A page displaying all available books with search and filter capabilities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: catalog-page** - Type: Div - Container for the catalog page.
  - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search books by title, author, or ISBN.
  - **ID: category-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by category (Fiction, Non-Fiction, Science, History, etc.).
  - **ID: books-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying book cards with cover, title, author, and price.
  - **ID: view-book-button-{book_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view book details (each book card has this).

### 3. Book Details Page
- **Page Title**: Book Details
- **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific book.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: book-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the book details page.
  - **ID: book-title** - Type: H1 - Display book title.
  - **ID: book-author** - Type: Div - Display book author.
  - **ID: book-price** - Type: Div - Display book price.
  - **ID: add-to-cart-button** - Type: Button - Button to add book to shopping cart.
  - **ID: book-reviews** - Type: Div - Section displaying customer reviews.

### 4. Shopping Cart Page
- **Page Title**: Shopping Cart
- **Overview**: A page displaying items in the cart with quantity management and checkout option.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: cart-page** - Type: Div - Container for the cart page.
  - **ID: cart-items-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying cart items with title, quantity, price, and subtotal.
  - **ID: update-quantity-{item_id}** - Type: Input (number) - Field to update item quantity (each cart item has this).
  - **ID: remove-item-button-{item_id}** - Type: Button - Button to remove item from cart (each cart item has this).
  - **ID: proceed-checkout-button** - Type: Button - Button to proceed to checkout.
  - **ID: total-amount** - Type: Div - Display total cart amount.

### 5. Checkout Page
- **Page Title**: Checkout
- **Overview**: A page for users to enter shipping information and complete purchase.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: checkout-page** - Type: Div - Container for the checkout page.
  - **ID: customer-name** - Type: Input - Field to input customer name.
  - **ID: shipping-address** - Type: Textarea - Field to input shipping address.
  - **ID: payment-method** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select payment method (Credit Card, PayPal, Bank Transfer).
  - **ID: place-order-button** - Type: Button - Button to confirm and place order.

### 6. Order History Page
- **Page Title**: Order History
- **Overview**: A page displaying all previous orders with tracking information.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: orders-page** - Type: Div - Container for the orders page.
  - **ID: orders-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying orders with order ID, date, total amount, and status.
  - **ID: view-order-button-{order_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view order details (each order has this).
  - **ID: order-status-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by status (All, Pending, Shipped, Delivered).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 7. Reviews Page
- **Page Title**: Customer Reviews
- **Overview**: A page displaying all customer reviews and allowing users to write new reviews.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: reviews-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reviews page.
  - **ID: reviews-list** - Type: Div - List of all reviews with book title, rating, and review text.
  - **ID: write-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to write review page.
  - **ID: filter-by-rating** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter reviews by rating (All, 5 stars, 4 stars, etc.).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 8. Write Review Page
- **Page Title**: Write a Review
- **Overview**: A page for users to write reviews for purchased books.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: write-review-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write review page.
  - **ID: select-book** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select book to review.
  - **ID: rating-select** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select rating (1-5 stars).
  - **ID: review-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write review text.
  - **ID: submit-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit review.

### 9. Bestsellers Page
- **Page Title**: Bestsellers
- **Overview**: A page displaying top-selling books ranked by sales.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: bestsellers-page** - Type: Div - Container for the bestsellers page.
  - **ID: bestsellers-list** - Type: Div - Ranked list of bestselling books with rank, title, author, and sales count.
  - **ID: time-period-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by time period (This Week, This Month, All Time).
  - **ID: view-book-button-{book_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view book details (each bestseller has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

## 4. Data Storage

The 'BookstoreOnline' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:

### 1. Books Data
- **File Name**: `books.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  book_id|title|author|isbn|category|price|stock|description
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|The Great Gatsby|F. Scott Fitzgerald|9780743273565|Fiction|12.99|50|A classic American novel
  2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|9780062316097|Non-Fiction|16.99|30|A brief history of humankind
  3|1984|George Orwell|9780451524935|Fiction|14.99|45|Dystopian social science fiction
  ```

### 2. Categories Data
- **File Name**: `categories.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  category_id|category_name|description
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Fiction|Fictional narratives and novels
  2|Non-Fiction|Factual and educational books
  3|Science|Scientific topics and research
  ```

### 3. Cart Data
- **File Name**: `cart.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  cart_id|book_id|quantity|added_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|2|2025-01-15
  2|3|1|2025-01-16
  ```

### 4. Orders Data
- **File Name**: `orders.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  order_id|customer_name|order_date|total_amount|status|shipping_address
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|John Doe|2025-01-10|38.97|Delivered|123 Main St, New York, NY 10001
  2|Jane Smith|2025-01-14|16.99|Shipped|456 Oak Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90001
  ```

### 5. Order Items Data
- **File Name**: `order_items.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  order_item_id|order_id|book_id|quantity|price
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|1|2|12.99
  2|1|3|1|14.99
  3|2|2|1|16.99
  ```

### 6. Reviews Data
- **File Name**: `reviews.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  review_id|book_id|customer_name|rating|review_text|review_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Amazing book! A true classic.|2025-01-12
  2|2|Bob Williams|4|Very informative and well-written.|2025-01-13
  3|3|Charlie Brown|5|Thought-provoking and relevant today.|2025-01-15
  ```

### 7. Bestsellers Data
- **File Name**: `bestsellers.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  book_id|sales_count|period
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  2|150|This Month
  1|120|This Month
  3|95|This Month
  ```

Order History Page - **Page Title**: Order History - **Overview**: A page displaying all previous orders with tracking information. - **Elements**:   - **ID: orders-page** - Type: Div - Container for the orders page.   - **ID: orders-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying orders with order ID, date, total amount, and status.   - **ID: view-order-button-{order_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view order details (each order has this).   - **ID: order-status-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by status (All, Pending, Shipped, Delivered).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 7. Reviews Page - **Page Title**: Customer Reviews - **Overview**: A page displaying all customer reviews and allowing users to write new reviews. - **Elements**:   - **ID: reviews-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reviews page.   - **ID: reviews-list** - Type: Div - List of all reviews with book title, rating, and review text.   - **ID: write-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to write review page.   - **ID: filter-by-rating** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter reviews by rating (All, 5 stars, 4 stars, etc.).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 8. Write Review Page - **Page Title**: Write a Review - **Overview**: A page for users to write reviews for purchased books. - **Elements**:   - **ID: write-review-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write review page.   - **ID: select-book** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select book to review.   - **ID: rating-select** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select rating (1-5 stars).   - **ID: review-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write review text.   - **ID: submit-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit review.  ### 9. Bestsellers Page - **Page Title**: Bestsellers - **Overview**: A page displaying top-selling books ranked by sales. - **Elements**:   - **ID: bestsellers-page** - Type: Div - Container for the bestsellers page.   - **ID: bestsellers-list** - Type: Div - Ranked list of bestselling books with rank, title, author, and sales count.   - **ID: time-period-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by time period (This Week, This Month, All Time).   - **ID: view-book-button-{book_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view book details (each bestseller has this).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ## 4. Data Storage  The 'BookstoreOnline' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:  ### 1. Books Data - **File Name**: `books.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   book_id|title|author|isbn|category|price|stock|description   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|The Great Gatsby|F. Scott Fitzgerald|9780743273565|Fiction|12.99|50|A classic American novel   2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|9780062316097|Non-Fiction|16.99|30|A brief history of humankind   3|1984|George Orwell|9780451524935|Fiction|14.99|45|Dystopian social science fiction   ```  ### 2. Categories Data - **File Name**: `categories.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   category_id|category_name|description   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|Fiction|Fictional narratives and novels   2|Non-Fiction|Factual and educational books   3|Science|Scientific topics and research   ```  ### 3. Cart Data - **File Name**: `cart.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   cart_id|book_id|quantity|added_date   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|1|2|2025-01-15   2|3|1|2025-01-16   ```  ### 4. Orders Data - **File Name**: `orders.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   order_id|customer_name|order_date|total_amount|status|shipping_address   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|John Doe|2025-01-10|38.97|Delivered|123 Main St, New York, NY 10001   2|Jane Smith|2025-01-14|16.99|Shipped|456 Oak Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90001   ```  ### 5. Order Items Data - **File Name**: `order_items.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   order_item_id|order_id|book_id|quantity|price   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|1|1|2|12.99   2|1|3|1|14.99   3|2|2|1|16.99   ```  ### 6. Reviews Data - **File Name**: `reviews.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   review_id|book_id|customer_name|rating|review_text|review_date   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Amazing book! A true classic.|2025-01-12   2|2|Bob Williams|4|Very informative and well-written.|2025-01-13   3|3|Charlie Brown|5|Thought-provoking and relevant today.|2025-01-15   ```  ### 7. Bestsellers Data - **File Name**: `bestsellers.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   book_id|sales_count|period   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   2|150|This Month   1|120|This Month   3|95|This Month   ```
