Dashboard\n- **Route Path:** `/`\n- **Function Name:** `dashboard`\n- **HTTP Methods:** `GET`\n- **Template Rendered:** `dashboard.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `featured_books` (List[Dict]): List of featured book dictionaries containing at least `book_id`, `title`, `author`, and `price`.\n- **POST Form Submissions:** None\n- **Behavior:** The root route redirects or renders Dashboard page with navigation buttons for catalog, cart, and bestsellers.\n\n### 2. Book Catalog\n- **Route Path:** `/catalog`\n- **Function Name:** `book_catalog`\n- **HTTP Methods:** `GET`, `POST`\n- **Template Rendered:** `catalog.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `books` (List[Dict]): Filtered and/or searched list of books.\n  - `categories` (List[Dict]): All book categories with `category_id` and `category_name`.\n  - `selected_category` (str|None): Currently selected category id string or None.\n  - `search_query` (str): Current search input string.\n- **POST Form Submissions:** User submits filter dropdown or search input to filter displayed books.\n\n### 3. Book Details\n- **Route Path:** `/book/<int:book_id>`\n- **Function Name:** `book_details`\n- **HTTP Methods:** `GET`, `POST`\n- **Template Rendered:** `details.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `book` (Dict): Detailed info about the book.\n  - `reviews` (List[Dict]): Customer reviews for the book.\n- **POST Form Submissions:** Form to add book to cart, triggered by `add-to-cart-button`.\n\n### 4. Shopping Cart\n- **Route Path:** `/cart`\n- **Function Name:** `shopping_cart`\n- **HTTP Methods:** `GET`, `POST`\n- **Template Rendered:** `cart.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `cart_items` (List[Dict]): Cart items with fields `item_id`, `book_id`, `title`, `quantity`, `price`, `subtotal`.\n  - `total_amount` (float): Total price for all items.\n- **POST Form Submissions:** Update quantity or remove item via fields with IDs `update-quantity-{item_id}` and `remove-item-button-{item_id}` respectively.\n\n### 5. Checkout\n- **Route Path:** `/checkout`\n- **Function Name:** `checkout`\n- **HTTP Methods:** `GET`, `POST`\n- **Template Rendered:** `checkout.html`\n- **Context Variables:** None\n- **POST Form Submissions:** Customer inputs name (`customer-name`), shipping address (`shipping-address`), selects payment method (`payment-method`), then submits with `place-order-button`.\n\n### 6. Order History\n- **Route Path:** `/orders`\n- **Function Name:** `order_history`\n- **HTTP Methods:** `GET`, `POST`\n- **Template Rendered:** `history.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `orders` (List[Dict]): Orders filtered by status.\n  - `status_filter` (str): Currently selected filter.\n- **POST Form Submissions:** Status filter changes or request to view specific order via `view-order-button-{order_id}`.\n\n### 7. Reviews\n- **Route Path:** `/reviews`\n- **Function Name:** `reviews`\n- **HTTP Methods:** `GET`, `POST`\n- **Template Rendered:** `reviews.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `reviews` (List[Dict]): Reviews filtered by rating.\n  - `rating_filter` (str|int): Current rating filter.\n- **POST Form Submissions:** Dropdown filter POST or navigation to write review page.\n\n### 8. Write Review\n- **Route Path:** `/write_review`\n- **Function Name:** `write_review`\n- **HTTP Methods:** `GET`, `POST`\n- **Template Rendered:** `write_review.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `purchased_books` (List[Dict]): Books bought by the user.\n- **POST Form Submissions:** Form with `select-book`, `rating-select`, `review-text`, submitted with `submit-review-button`.\n\n### 9. Bestsellers\n- **Route Path:** `/bestsellers`\n- **Function Name:** `bestsellers`\n- **HTTP Methods:** `GET`, `POST`\n- **Template Rendered:** `bestsellers.html`\n- **Context Variables:**\n  - `bestsellers` (List[Dict]): Ranked books for the selected time period.\n  - `time_period` (str): Current filter period.\n- **POST Form Submissions:** Dropdown filter or viewing book details.\n\n---\n\n## Section 2: HTML Templates Specification\n\n### 1. dashboard.html\n- **File:** `templates/dashboard.html`\n- **Page Title:** \"Bookstore Dashboard\"\n- **Main Heading:** `<h1>Bookstore Dashboard</h1>`\n- **Elements:**\n  - `div#dashboard-page`: Container div for page.\n  - `div#featured-books`: Displays several featured book cards.\n  - `button#browse-catalog-button`: Navigates to `/catalog`.\n  - `button#view-cart-button`: Navigates to `/cart`.\n  - `button#bestsellers-button`: Navigates to `/bestsellers`.\n- **Context Variables:** `featured_books` (List[Dict])\n- **Links/Buttons:** Navigate using `url_for('book_catalog')`, `url_for('shopping_cart')`, `url_for('bestsellers')` respectively.\n- **Forms:** None\n\n### 2. catalog.html\n- **File:** `templates/catalog.html`\n- **Page Title:** \"Book Catalog\"\n- **Main Heading:** `<h1>Book Catalog</h1>`\n- **Elements:**\n  - `div#catalog-page`: Container div.\n  - `input#search-input`: Text input for search.\n  - `select#category-filter`: Dropdown to select book category.\n  - `div#books-grid`: Grid container for books.\n  - `button#view-book-button-{book_id}`: Button for each book to navigate to book details.\n- **Context Variables:** `books`, `categories`, `selected_category`, `search_query`\n- **Links/Buttons:** Buttons use `url_for('book_details', book_id=book_id)`.\n- **Forms:** Search and filter via POST form submission.\n\n### 3. details.html\n- **File:** `templates/details.html`\n- **Page Title:** \"Book Details\"\n- **Main Heading:** `<h1 id=\"book-title\">{{ book.title }}</h1>`\n- **Elements:**\n  - `div#book-details-page`: Container.\n  - `div#book-author`: Displays `book.author`.\n  - `div#book-price`: Displays `book.price`.\n  - `button#add-to-cart-button`: Form button to add book to cart via POST.\n  - `div#book-reviews`: Displays reviews for this book.\n- **Context Variables:** `book`, `reviews`\n- **Forms:** POST on `add-to-cart-button` to add book to cart.\n\n### 4. cart.html\n- **File:** `templates/cart.html`\n- **Page Title:** \"Shopping Cart\"\n- **Main Heading:** `<h1>Shopping Cart</h1>`\n- **Elements:**\n  - `div#cart-page`: Container for cart.\n  - `table#cart-items-table`: Table rows for each cart item.\n    - Each has inputs:\n      - `input#update-quantity-{item_id}`: Number to update quantity.\n      - `button#remove-item-button-{item_id}`: Button to remove.\n  - `div#total-amount`: Displays total cart price.\n  - `button#proceed-checkout-button`: Button to go to checkout.\n- **Context Variables:** `cart_items`, `total_amount`\n- **Forms:** POST form for quantity update or item removal.\n\n### 5. checkout.html\n- **File:** `templates/checkout.html`\n- **Page Title:** \"Checkout\"\n- **Main Heading:** `<h1>Checkout</h1>`\n- **Elements:**\n  - `div#checkout-page`: Container.\n  - `input#customer-name`: Text input.\n  - `textarea#shipping-address`: Text area.\n  - `select#payment-method`: Dropdown to select payment method.\n  - `button#place-order-button`: Form button to place order.\n- **Context Variables:** None\n- **Forms:** POST form submission for placing order.\n\n### 6. history.html\n- **File:** `templates/history.html`\n- **Page Title:** \"Order History\"\n- **Main Heading:** `<h1>Order History</h1>`\n- **Elements:**\n  - `div#orders-page`: Container.\n  - `table#orders-table`: Rows showing order ID, date, total, status.\n  - `button#view-order-button-{order_id}`: Button per order.\n  - `select#order-status-filter`: Dropdown to filter status.\n  - `button#back-to-dashboard`: Navigation button.\n- **Context Variables:** `orders`, `status_filter`\n- **Forms:** POST filter, view order detail.\n\n### 7. reviews.html\n- **File:** `templates/reviews.html`\n- **Page Title:** \"Customer Reviews\"\n- **Main Heading:** `<h1>Customer Reviews</h1>`\n- **Elements:**\n  - `div#reviews-page`: Container.\n  - `div#reviews-list`: List of reviews.\n  - `button#write-review-button`: Navigate to write review.\n  - `select#filter-by-rating`: Dropdown filter.\n  - `button#back-to-dashboard`: Navigation button.\n- **Context Variables:** `reviews`, `rating_filter`\n- **Forms:** POST submit filter.\n\n### 8. write_review.html\n- **File:** `templates/write_review.html`\n- **Page Title:** \"Write a Review\"\n- **Main Heading:** `<h1>Write a Review</h1>`\n- **Elements:**\n  - `div#write-review-page`: Container.\n  - `select#select-book`: Dropdown of purchased books.\n  - `select#rating-select`: Dropdown 1 to 5 stars.\n  - `textarea#review-text`: Text input.\n  - `button#submit-review-button`: Submit review.\n- **Context Variables:** `purchased_books`\n- **Forms:** POST for submitting review.\n\n### 9. bestsellers.html\n- **File:** `templates/bestsellers.html`\n- **Page Title:** \"Bestsellers\"\n- **Main Heading:** `<h1>Bestsellers</h1>`\n- **Elements:**\n  - `div#bestsellers-page`: Container.\n  - `div#bestsellers-list`: Ranked list of books.\n  - `select#time-period-filter`: Dropdown for time periods.\n  - `button#view-book-button-{book_id}`: Button to details for each book.\n  - `button#back-to-dashboard`: Navigation button.\n- **Context Variables:** `bestsellers`, `time_period`\n- **Forms:** POST filters or selection.\n\n---\n\n## Section 3: Data Schemas Specification\n\n### 1. books.txt\n- **File Path:** `data/books.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-delimited (`|`)\n- **Fields:**\n  1. `book_id` (int)\n  2. `title` (str)\n  3. `author` (str)\n  4. `isbn` (str)\n  5. `category` (str)\n  6. `price` (float)\n  7. `stock` (int)\n  8. `description` (str)\n- **Description:** Contains full details for all books.\n- **Example Rows:**\n```\n1|The Great Gatsby|F. Scott Fitzgerald|9780743273565|Fiction|12.99|50|A classic American novel\n2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|9780062316097|Non-Fiction|16.99|30|A brief history of humankind\n3|1984|George Orwell|9780451524935|Fiction|14.99|45|Dystopian social science fiction\n```\n\n### 2. categories.txt\n- **File Path:** `data/categories.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-delimited\n- **Fields:**\n  1. `category_id` (int)\n  2. `category_name` (str)\n  3. `description` (str)\n- **Description:** Holds all book categories.\n- **Example Rows:**\n```\n1|Fiction|Fictional narratives and novels\n2|Non-Fiction|Factual and educational books\n3|Science|Scientific topics and research\n```\n\n### 3. cart.txt\n- **File Path:** `data/cart.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-delimited\n- **Fields:**\n  1. `cart_id` (int)\n  2. `book_id` (int)\n  3. `quantity` (int)\n  4. `added_date` (date `YYYY-MM-DD`)\n- **Description:** Contains current user cart items.\n- **Example Rows:**\n```\n1|1|2|2025-01-15\n2|3|1|2025-01-16\n```\n\n### 4. orders.txt\n- **File Path:** `data/orders.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-delimited\n- **Fields:**\n  1. `order_id` (int)\n  2. `customer_name` (str)\n  3. `order_date` (date `YYYY-MM-DD`)\n  4. `total_amount` (float)\n  5. `status` (str)\n  6. `shipping_address` (str)\n- **Description:** Contains customer order records.\n- **Example Rows:**\n```\n1|John Doe|2025-01-10|38.97|Delivered|123 Main St, New York, NY 10001\n2|Jane Smith|2025-01-14|16.99|Shipped|456 Oak Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90001\n```\n\n### 5. order_items.txt\n- **File Path:** `data/order_items.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-delimited\n- **Fields:**\n  1. `order_item_id` (int)\n  2. `order_id` (int)\n  3. `book_id` (int)\n  4. `quantity` (int)\n  5. `price` (float)\n- **Description:** Details line items for each order.\n- **Example Rows:**\n```\n1|1|1|2|12.99\n2|1|3|1|14.99\n3|2|2|1|16.99\n```\n\n### 6. reviews.txt\n- **File Path:** `data/reviews.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-delimited\n- **Fields:**\n  1. `review_id` (int)\n  2. `book_id` (int)\n  3. `customer_name` (str)\n  4. `rating` (int, 1-5)\n  5. `review_text` (str)\n  6. `review_date` (date `YYYY-MM-DD`)\n- **Description:** Customer feedback on books.\n- **Example Rows:**\n```\n1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Amazing book! A true classic.|2025-01-12\n2|2|Bob Williams|4|Very informative and well-written.|2025-01-13\n3|3|Charlie Brown|5|Thought-provoking and relevant today.|2025-01-15\n```\n\n### 7. bestsellers.txt\n- **File Path:** `data/bestsellers.txt`\n- **Format:** Pipe-delimited\n- **Fields:**\n  1. `book_id` (int)\n  2. `sales_count` (int)\n  3. `period` (str) (e.g., \"This Week\", \"This Month\", \"All Time\")\n- **Description:** Ranking of books by sales volume for specified period.\n- **Example Rows:**\n```\n2|150|This Month\n1|120|This Month\n3|95|This Month\n```\n\n---\n\nThis design specification provides explicit mappings for Flask routes including paths, methods, functions, templates, context variables, and POST behaviors; detailed descriptions of HTML templates, their element IDs and usage; and the precise data schema descriptions for all text-based storage files, enabling independent backend and frontend development for the BookstoreOnline application."})

Reviews\n- Route Path: `/reviews`\n- Function Name: `reviews`\n- HTTP Methods: GET, POST\n- Template Rendered: `reviews.html`\n- Context Variables:\n  - `reviews` (List[Dict]): Customer reviews.\n  - `rating_filter` (str|int): Star rating filter selected.\n- POST Behavior: Filter reviews by rating dropdown, navigate to write review via `write-review-button`.\n\n### 8. Write Review\n- Route Path: `/write_review`\n- Function Name: `write_review`\n- HTTP Methods: GET, POST\n- Template Rendered: `write_review.html`\n- Context Variables:\n  - `purchased_books` (List[Dict]): Books eligible for reviews.\n- POST Behavior: Review submission handling with fields `select-book`, `rating-select`, `review-text` and `submit-review-button`.\n\n### 9. Bestsellers\n- Route Path: `/bestsellers`\n- Function Name: `bestsellers`\n- HTTP Methods: GET, POST\n- Template Rendered: `bestsellers.html`\n- Context Variables:\n  - `bestsellers` (List[Dict]): List of bestselling books.\n  - `time_period` (str): Selected time period filter.\n- POST Behavior: Handles time period filter and book detail views.\n\n---\n\n## Section 2: HTML Templates Specification\n\n### dashboard.html\n- File path: `templates/dashboard.html`\n- Page title: \"Bookstore Dashboard\"\n- Main heading: `<h1>Bookstore Dashboard</h1>`\n- Element IDs:\n  - `dashboard-page` (Div): Main container\n  - `featured-books` (Div): Displays featured books\n  - `browse-catalog-button` (Button): Navigates to `/catalog`\n  - `view-cart-button` (Button): Navigates to `/cart`\n  - `bestsellers-button` (Button): Navigates to `/bestsellers`\n- Context variables: `featured_books`\n- Navigation via `url_for` calls to respective routes\n- No forms\n\n### catalog.html\n- File path: `templates/catalog.html`\n- Page title: \"Book Catalog\"\n- Main heading: `<h1>Book Catalog</h1>`\n- Element IDs:\n  - `catalog-page` (Div): Main container\n  - `search-input` (Input): Text search input\n  - `category-filter` (Dropdown): Category filter\n  - `books-grid` (Div): Container for book cards\n  - `view-book-button-{book_id}` (Button): View book details button per book\n- Context variables: `books`, `categories`, `selected_category`, `search_query`\n- Buttons navigation via `url_for('book_details', book_id=book_id)`\n- Search and filter via POST form submission\n\n### details.html\n- File path: `templates/details.html`\n- Page title: \"Book Details\"\n- Main heading: `<h1 id=\"book-title\">{{ book.title }}</h1>`\n- Element IDs:\n  - `book-details-page` (Div): Container\n  - `book-author` (Div): Book author\n  - `book-price` (Div): Book price\n  - `add-to-cart-button` (Button): Adds book to cart (POST button)\n  - `book-reviews` (Div): Displays reviews\n- Context variables: `book`, `reviews`\n- POST form with `add-to-cart-button` to add the book to the cart\n\n### cart.html\n- File path: `templates/cart.html`\n- Page title: \"Shopping Cart\"\n- Main heading: `<h1>Shopping Cart</h1>`\n- Element IDs:\n  - `cart-page` (Div): Main container\n  - `cart-items-table` (Table): Displays cart items\n  - `update-quantity-{item_id}` (Input Number): Quantity input for each cart item\n  - `remove-item-button-{item_id}` (Button): Button to remove item from cart\n  - `proceed-checkout-button` (Button): Proceeds to checkout\n  - `total-amount` (Div): Displays total amount\n- Context variables: `cart_items`, `total_amount`\n- POST forms for quantity update and removal\n\n### checkout.html\n- File path: `templates/checkout.html`\n- Page title: \"Checkout\"\n- Main heading: `<h1>Checkout</h1>`\n- Element IDs:\n  - `checkout-page` (Div): Container\n  - `customer-name` (Input): Customer name input\n  - `shipping-address` (Textarea): Shipping address input\n  - `payment-method` (Dropdown): Payment method selection\n  - `place-order-button` (Button): Submit order\n- Context variables: None\n- POST form submission\n\n### history.html\n- File path: `templates/history.html`\n- Page title: \"Order History\"\n- Main heading: `<h1>Order History</h1>`\n- Element IDs:\n  - `orders-page` (Div): Container\n  - `orders-table` (Table): Table listing order records\n  - `view-order-button-{order_id}` (Button): View order details\n  - `order-status-filter` (Dropdown): Filter orders by status\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigate back to dashboard\n- Context variables: `orders`, `status_filter`\n- POST form to filter or view order\n\n### reviews.html\n- File path: `templates/reviews.html`\n- Page title: \"Customer Reviews\"\n- Main heading: `<h1>Customer Reviews</h1>`\n- Element IDs:\n  - `reviews-page` (Div): Container\n  - `reviews-list` (Div): Contains all reviews\n  - `write-review-button` (Button): Navigate to write review page\n  - `filter-by-rating` (Dropdown): Filter reviews by rating\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigate back to dashboard\n- Context variables: `reviews`, `rating_filter`\n- POST form submission\n\n### write_review.html\n- File path: `templates/write_review.html`\n- Page title: \"Write a Review\"\n- Main heading: `<h1>Write a Review</h1>`\n- Element IDs:\n  - `write-review-page` (Div): Container\n  - `select-book` (Dropdown): Select book to review\n  - `rating-select` (Dropdown): Select rating 1-5\n  - `review-text` (Textarea): Input review text\n  - `submit-review-button` (Button): Submit review\n- Context variables: `purchased_books`\n- POST form submission\n\n### bestsellers.html\n- File path: `templates/bestsellers.html`\n- Page title: \"Bestsellers\"\n- Main heading: `<h1>Bestsellers</h1>`\n- Element IDs:\n  - `bestsellers-page` (Div): Container\n  - `bestsellers-list` (Div): Ranked list of bestsellers\n  - `time-period-filter` (Dropdown): Filter by time period\n  - `view-book-button-{book_id}` (Button): View book\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Back to dashboard\n- Context variables: `bestsellers`, `time_period`\n- POST forms for filtering and navigation\n\n---\n\n## Section 3: Data Schemas Specification\n\n### 1. books.txt\n- File Path: `data/books.txt`\n- Format: Pipe-delimited (`|`)\n- Fields (in order):\n  1. `book_id` (int)\n  2. `title` (str)\n  3. `author` (str)\n  4. `isbn` (str)\n  5. `category` (str)\n  6. `price` (float)\n  7. `stock` (int)\n  8. `description` (str)\n- Description: Complete book records.\n- Example Rows:\n```\n1|The Great Gatsby|F. Scott Fitzgerald|9780743273565|Fiction|12.99|50|A classic American novel\n2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|9780062316097|Non-Fiction|16.99|30|A brief history of humankind\n3|1984|George Orwell|9780451524935|Fiction|14.99|45|Dystopian social science fiction\n```\n\n### 2. categories.txt\n- File Path: `data/categories.txt`\n- Format: Pipe-delimited\n- Fields:\n  1. `category_id` (int)\n  2. `category_name` (str)\n  3. `description` (str)\n- Description: Book categories.\n- Example Rows:\n```\n1|Fiction|Fictional narratives and novels\n2|Non-Fiction|Factual and educational books\n3|Science|Scientific topics and research\n```\n\n### 3. cart.txt\n- File Path: `data/cart.txt`\n- Format: Pipe-delimited\n- Fields:\n  1. `cart_id` (int)\n  2. `book_id` (int)\n  3. `quantity` (int)\n  4. `added_date` (date YYYY-MM-DD)\n- Description: Current cart items.\n- Example Rows:\n```\n1|1|2|2025-01-15\n2|3|1|2025-01-16\n```\n\n### 4. orders.txt\n- File Path: `data/orders.txt`\n- Format: Pipe-delimited\n- Fields:\n  1. `order_id` (int)\n  2. `customer_name` (str)\n  3. `order_date` (date YYYY-MM-DD)\n  4. `total_amount` (float)\n  5. `status` (str)\n  6. `shipping_address` (str)\n- Description: Customer orders.\n- Example Rows:\n```\n1|John Doe|2025-01-10|38.97|Delivered|123 Main St, New York, NY 10001\n2|Jane Smith|2025-01-14|16.99|Shipped|456 Oak Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90001\n```\n\n### 5. order_items.txt\n- File Path: `data/order_items.txt`\n- Format: Pipe-delimited\n- Fields:\n  1. `order_item_id` (int)\n  2. `order_id` (int)\n  3. `book_id` (int)\n  4. `quantity` (int)\n  5. `price` (float)\n- Description: Items for each order.\n- Example Rows:\n```\n1|1|1|2|12.99\n2|1|3|1|14.99\n3|2|2|1|16.99\n```\n\n### 6. reviews.txt\n- File Path: `data/reviews.txt`\n- Format: Pipe-delimited\n- Fields:\n  1. `review_id` (int)\n  2. `book_id` (int)\n  3. `customer_name` (str)\n  4. `rating` (int 1-5)\n  5. `review_text` (str)\n  6. `review_date` (date YYYY-MM-DD)\n- Description: Customer reviews.\n- Example Rows:\n```\n1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Amazing book! A true classic.|2025-01-12\n2|2|Bob Williams|4|Very informative and well-written.|2025-01-13\n3|3|Charlie Brown|5|Thought-provoking and relevant today.|2025-01-15\n```\n\n### 7. bestsellers.txt\n- File Path: `data/bestsellers.txt`\n- Format: Pipe-delimited\n- Fields:\n  1. `book_id` (int)\n  2. `sales_count` (int)\n  3. `period` (str) (e.g. This Week, This Month, All Time)\n- Description: Ranked sales data by period.\n- Example Rows:\n```\n2|150|This Month\n1|120|This Month\n3|95|This Month\n```\n\n---\n\nThis detailed specification enables backend and frontend developers to independently implement BookstoreOnline application with exact routing, template composition, element IDs, and data file specifications."})

  [design_spec.md] # BookstoreOnline Design Specification  ---  ## Section 1: Flask Routes Specification  ### 1. Dashboard - Route Path: `/` - Function Name: `dashboard` - HTTP Methods: GET - Template Rendered: `dashboard.html` - Context Variables:   - `featured_books` (List[Dict]): List of featured books with keys `book_id`, `title`, `author`, `price`. - POST Behavior: None  ### 2. Book Catalog - Route Path: `/catalog` - Function Name: `book_catalog` - HTTP Methods: GET, POST - Template Rendered: `catalog.html` - Context Variables:   - `books` (List[Dict]): List of books filtered/searched.   - `categories` (List[Dict]): List of available categories.   - `selected_category` (str|None): Currently selected category ID or None.   - `search_query` (str): Current search string. - POST Behavior: Handles search and filter submissions, updates displayed books accordingly.  ### 3. Book Details - Route Path: `/book/<int:book_id>` - Function Name: `book_details` - HTTP Methods: GET, POST - Template Rendered: `details.html` - Context Variables:   - `book` (Dict): Book details.   - `reviews` (List[Dict]): Related customer reviews for the book. - POST Behavior: Allows adding book to cart triggered by button `add-to-cart-button`.  ### 4. Shopping Cart - Route Path: `/cart` - Function Name: `shopping_cart` - HTTP Methods: GET, POST - Template Rendered: `cart.html` - Context Variables:   - `cart_items` (List[Dict]): Cart items, each with `item_id`, `book_id`, `title`, `quantity`, `price`, and `subtotal`.   - `total_amount` (float): Total cart price. - POST Behavior: Handles updates to item quantity via input IDs `update-quantity-{item_id}` and removal of items via buttons `remove-item-button-{item_id}`.  ### 5. Checkout - Route Path: `/checkout` - Function Name: `checkout` - HTTP Methods: GET, POST - Template Rendered: `checkout.html` - Context Variables: None - POST Behavior: Processes submitted customer name, shipping address, and payment method via form with `place-order-button`.  ### 6. Order History - Route Path: `/orders` - Function Name: `order_history` - HTTP Methods: GET, POST - Template Rendered: `history.html` - Context Variables:   - `orders` (List[Dict]): List of customer orders.   - `status_filter` (str): Current status filter (All, Pending, Shipped, Delivered). - POST Behavior: Filtering by order status and viewing order details triggered by button `view-order-button-{order_id}`.  ### 7. Reviews - Route Path: `/reviews` - Function Name: `reviews` - HTTP Methods: GET, POST - Template Rendered: `reviews.html` - Context Variables:   - `reviews` (List[Dict]): Customer reviews.   - `rating_filter` (str|int): Star rating filter selected. - POST Behavior: Filter reviews by rating dropdown, navigate to write review via `write-review-button`.  ### 8. Write Review - Route Path: `/write_review` - Function Name: `write_review` - HTTP Methods: GET, POST - Template Rendered: `write_review.html` - Context Variables:   - `purchased_books` (List[Dict]): Books eligible for reviews. - POST Behavior: Review submission handling with fields `select-book`, `rating-select`, `review-text` and `submit-review-button`.  ### 9. Bestsellers - Route Path: `/bestsellers` - Function Name: `bestsellers` - HTTP Methods: GET, POST - Template Rendered: `bestsellers.html` - Context Variables:   - `bestsellers` (List[Dict]): List of bestselling books.   - `time_period` (str): Selected time period filter. - POST Behavior: Handles time period filter and book detail views.  ---  ## Section 2: HTML Templates Specification  ### dashboard.html - File path: `templates/dashboard.html` - Page title: "Bookstore Dashboard" - Main heading: `<h1>Bookstore Dashboard</h1>` - Element IDs:   - `dashboard-page` (Div): Main container   - `featured-books` (Div): Displays featured books   - `browse-catalog-button` (Button): Navigates to `/catalog`   - `view-cart-button` (Button): Navigates to `/cart`   - `bestsellers-button` (Button): Navigates to `/bestsellers` - Context variables: `featured_books` - Navigation via `url_for` calls to respective routes - No forms  ### catalog.html - File path: `templates/catalog.html` - Page title: "Book Catalog" - Main heading: `<h1>Book Catalog</h1>` - Element IDs:   - `catalog-page` (Div): Main container   - `search-input` (Input): Text search input   - `category-filter` (Dropdown): Category filter   - `books-grid` (Div): Container for book cards   - `view-book-button-{book_id}` (Button): View book details button per book - Context variables: `books`, `categories`, `selected_category`, `search_query` - Buttons navigation via `url_for('book_details', book_id=book_id)` - Search and filter via POST form submission  ### details.html - File path: `templates/details.html` - Page title: "Book Details" - Main heading: `<h1 id="book-title">{{ book.title }}</h1>` - Element IDs:   - `book-details-page` (Div): Container   - `book-author` (Div): Book author   - `book-price` (Div): Book price   - `add-to-cart-button` (Button): Adds book to cart (POST button)   - `book-reviews` (Div): Displays reviews - Context variables: `book`, `reviews` - POST form with `add-to-cart-button` to add the book to the cart  ### cart.html - File path: `templates/cart.html` - Page title: "Shopping Cart" - Main heading: `<h1>Shopping Cart</h1>` - Element IDs:   - `cart-page` (Div): Main container   - `cart-items-table` (Table): Displays cart items   - `update-quantity-{item_id}` (Input Number): Quantity input for each cart item   - `remove-item-button-{item_id}` (Button): Button to remove item from cart   - `proceed-checkout-button` (Button): Proceeds to checkout   - `total-amount` (Div): Displays total amount - Context variables: `cart_items`, `total_amount` - POST forms for quantity update and removal  ### checkout.html - File path: `templates/checkout.html` - Page title: "Checkout" - Main heading: `<h1>Checkout</h1>` - Element IDs:   - `checkout-page` (Div): Container   - `customer-name` (Input): Customer name input   - `shipping-address` (Textarea): Shipping address input   - `payment-method` (Dropdown): Payment method selection   - `place-order-button` (Button): Submit order - Context variables: None - POST form submission  ### history.html - File path: `templates/history.html` - Page title: "Order History" - Main heading: `<h1>Order History</h1>` - Element IDs:   - `orders-page` (Div): Container   - `orders-table` (Table): Table listing order records   - `view-order-button-{order_id}` (Button): View order details   - `order-status-filter` (Dropdown): Filter orders by status   - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigate back to dashboard - Context variables: `orders`, `status_filter` - POST form to filter or view order  ### reviews.html - File path: `templates/reviews.html` - Page title: "Customer Reviews" - Main heading: `<h1>Customer Reviews</h1>` - Element IDs:   - `reviews-page` (Div): Container   - `reviews-list` (Div): Contains all reviews   - `write-review-button` (Button): Navigate to write review page   - `filter-by-rating` (Dropdown): Filter reviews by rating   - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigate back to dashboard - Context variables: `reviews`, `rating_filter` - POST form submission  ### write_review.html - File path: `templates/write_review.html` - Page title: "Write a Review" - Main heading: `<h1>Write a Review</h1>` - Element IDs:   - `write-review-page` (Div): Container   - `select-book` (Dropdown): Select book to review   - `rating-select` (Dropdown): Select rating 1-5   - `review-text` (Textarea): Input review text   - `submit-review-button` (Button): Submit review - Context variables: `purchased_books` - POST form submission  ### bestsellers.html - File path: `templates/bestsellers.html` - Page title: "Bestsellers" - Main heading: `<h1>Bestsellers</h1>` - Element IDs:   - `bestsellers-page` (Div): Container   - `bestsellers-list` (Div): Ranked list of bestsellers   - `time-period-filter` (Dropdown): Filter by time period   - `view-book-button-{book_id}` (Button): View book   - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Back to dashboard - Context variables: `bestsellers`, `time_period` - POST forms for filtering and navigation  ---  ## Section 3: Data Schemas Specification  ### 1. books.txt - File Path: `data/books.txt` - Format: Pipe-delimited (`|`) - Fields (in order):   1. `book_id` (int)   2. `title` (str)   3. `author` (str)   4. `isbn` (str)   5. `category` (str)   6. `price` (float)   7. `stock` (int)   8. `description` (str) - Description: Complete book records. - Example Rows: ``` 1|The Great Gatsby|F. Scott Fitzgerald|9780743273565|Fiction|12.99|50|A classic American novel 2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|9780062316097|Non-Fiction|16.99|30|A brief history of humankind 3|1984|George Orwell|9780451524935|Fiction|14.99|45|Dystopian social science fiction ```  ### 2. categories.txt - File Path: `data/categories.txt` - Format: Pipe-delimited - Fields:   1. `category_id` (int)   2. `category_name` (str)   3. `description` (str) - Description: Book categories. - Example Rows: ``` 1|Fiction|Fictional narratives and novels 2|Non-Fiction|Factual and educational books 3|Science|Scientific topics and research ```  ### 3. cart.txt - File Path: `data/cart.txt` - Format: Pipe-delimited - Fields:   1. `cart_id` (int)   2. `book_id` (int)   3. `quantity` (int)   4. `added_date` (date YYYY-MM-DD) - Description: Current cart items. - Example Rows: ``` 1|1|2|2025-01-15 2|3|1|2025-01-16 ```  ### 4. orders.txt - File Path: `data/orders.txt` - Format: Pipe-delimited - Fields:   1. `order_id` (int)   2. `customer_name` (str)   3. `order_date` (date YYYY-MM-DD)   4. `total_amount` (float)   5. `status` (str)   6. `shipping_address` (str) - Description: Customer orders. - Example Rows: ``` 1|John Doe|2025-01-10|38.97|Delivered|123 Main St, New York, NY 10001 2|Jane Smith|2025-01-14|16.99|Shipped|456 Oak Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90001 ```  ### 5. order_items.txt - File Path: `data/order_items.txt` - Format: Pipe-delimited - Fields:   1. `order_item_id` (int)   2. `order_id` (int)   3. `book_id` (int)   4. `quantity` (int)   5. `price` (float) - Description: Items for each order. - Example Rows: ``` 1|1|1|2|12.99 2|1|3|1|14.99 3|2|2|1|16.99 ```  ### 6. reviews.txt - File Path: `data/reviews.txt` - Format: Pipe-delimited - Fields:   1. `review_id` (int)   2. `book_id` (int)   3. `customer_name` (str)   4. `rating` (int 1-5)   5. `review_text` (str)   6. `review_date` (date YYYY-MM-DD) - Description: Customer reviews. - Example Rows: ``` 1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Amazing book! A true classic.|2025-01-12 2|2|Bob Williams|4|Very informative and well-written.|2025-01-13 3|3|Charlie Brown|5|Thought-provoking and relevant today.|2025-01-15 ```  ### 7. bestsellers.txt - File Path: `data/bestsellers.txt` - Format: Pipe-delimited - Fields:   1. `book_id` (int)   2. `sales_count` (int)   3. `period` (str) (e.g. This Week, This Month, All Time) - Description: Ranked sales data by period. - Example Rows: ``` 2|150|This Month 1|120|This Month 3|95|This Month ```  ---  This detailed specification enables backend and frontend developers to independently implement BookstoreOnline application with exact routing, template composition, element IDs, and data file specifications.

=== design_spec.md ===
# BookstoreOnline Design Specification

---

## Section 1: Flask Routes Specification

### 1. Dashboard
- Route Path: `/`
- Function Name: `dashboard`
- HTTP Methods: GET
- Template Rendered: `dashboard.html`
- Context Variables:
  - `featured_books` (List[Dict]): List of featured books with keys `book_id`, `title`, `author`, `price`.
- POST Behavior: None

### 2. Book Catalog
- Route Path: `/catalog`
- Function Name: `book_catalog`
- HTTP Methods: GET, POST
- Template Rendered: `catalog.html`
- Context Variables:
  - `books` (List[Dict]): List of books filtered/searched.
  - `categories` (List[Dict]): List of available categories.
  - `selected_category` (str|None): Currently selected category ID or None.
  - `search_query` (str): Current search string.
- POST Behavior: Handles search and filter submissions, updates displayed books accordingly.

### 3. Book Details
- Route Path: `/book/<int:book_id>`
- Function Name: `book_details`
- HTTP Methods: GET, POST
- Template Rendered: `details.html`
- Context Variables:
  - `book` (Dict): Book details.
  - `reviews` (List[Dict]): Related customer reviews for the book.
- POST Behavior: Allows adding book to cart triggered by button `add-to-cart-button`.

### 4. Shopping Cart
- Route Path: `/cart`
- Function Name: `shopping_cart`
- HTTP Methods: GET, POST
- Template Rendered: `cart.html`
- Context Variables:
  - `cart_items` (List[Dict]): Cart items, each with `item_id`, `book_id`, `title`, `quantity`, `price`, and `subtotal`.
  - `total_amount` (float): Total cart price.
- POST Behavior: Handles updates to item quantity via input IDs `update-quantity-{item_id}` and removal of items via buttons `remove-item-button-{item_id}`.

### 5. Checkout
- Route Path: `/checkout`
- Function Name: `checkout`
- HTTP Methods: GET, POST
- Template Rendered: `checkout.html`
- Context Variables: None
- POST Behavior: Processes submitted customer name, shipping address, and payment method via form with `place-order-button`.

### 6. Order History
- Route Path: `/orders`
- Function Name: `order_history`
- HTTP Methods: GET, POST
- Template Rendered: `history.html`
- Context Variables:
  - `orders` (List[Dict]): List of customer orders.
  - `status_filter` (str): Current status filter (All, Pending, Shipped, Delivered).
- POST Behavior: Filtering by order status and viewing order details triggered by button `view-order-button-{order_id}`.

### 7. Reviews
- Route Path: `/reviews`
- Function Name: `reviews`
- HTTP Methods: GET, POST
- Template Rendered: `reviews.html`
- Context Variables:
  - `reviews` (List[Dict]): Customer reviews.
  - `rating_filter` (str|int): Star rating filter selected.
- POST Behavior: Filter reviews by rating dropdown, navigate to write review via `write-review-button`.

### 8. Write Review
- Route Path: `/write_review`
- Function Name: `write_review`
- HTTP Methods: GET, POST
- Template Rendered: `write_review.html`
- Context Variables:
  - `purchased_books` (List[Dict]): Books eligible for reviews.
- POST Behavior: Review submission handling with fields `select-book`, `rating-select`, `review-text` and `submit-review-button`.

### 9. Bestsellers
- Route Path: `/bestsellers`
- Function Name: `bestsellers`
- HTTP Methods: GET, POST
- Template Rendered: `bestsellers.html`
- Context Variables:
  - `bestsellers` (List[Dict]): List of bestselling books.
  - `time_period` (str): Selected time period filter.
- POST Behavior: Handles time period filter and book detail views.

---

## Section 2: HTML Templates Specification

### dashboard.html
- File path: `templates/dashboard.html`
- Page title: "Bookstore Dashboard"
- Main heading: `<h1>Bookstore Dashboard</h1>`
- Element IDs:
  - `dashboard-page` (Div): Main container
  - `featured-books` (Div): Displays featured books
  - `browse-catalog-button` (Button): Navigates to `/catalog`
  - `view-cart-button` (Button): Navigates to `/cart`
  - `bestsellers-button` (Button): Navigates to `/bestsellers`
- Context variables: `featured_books`
- Navigation via `url_for` calls to respective routes
- No forms

### catalog.html
- File path: `templates/catalog.html`
- Page title: "Book Catalog"
- Main heading: `<h1>Book Catalog</h1>`
- Element IDs:
  - `catalog-page` (Div): Main container
  - `search-input` (Input): Text search input
  - `category-filter` (Dropdown): Category filter
  - `books-grid` (Div): Container for book cards
  - `view-book-button-{book_id}` (Button): View book details button per book
- Context variables: `books`, `categories`, `selected_category`, `search_query`
- Buttons navigation via `url_for('book_details', book_id=book_id)`
- Search and filter via POST form submission

### details.html
- File path: `templates/details.html`
- Page title: "Book Details"
- Main heading: `<h1 id="book-title">{{ book.title }}</h1>`
- Element IDs:
  - `book-details-page` (Div): Container
  - `book-author` (Div): Book author
  - `book-price` (Div): Book price
  - `add-to-cart-button` (Button): Adds book to cart (POST button)
  - `book-reviews` (Div): Displays reviews
- Context variables: `book`, `reviews`
- POST form with `add-to-cart-button` to add the book to the cart

### cart.html
- File path: `templates/cart.html`
- Page title: "Shopping Cart"
- Main heading: `<h1>Shopping Cart</h1>`
- Element IDs:
  - `cart-page` (Div): Main container
  - `cart-items-table` (Table): Displays cart items
  - `update-quantity-{item_id}` (Input Number): Quantity input for each cart item
  - `remove-item-button-{item_id}` (Button): Button to remove item from cart
  - `proceed-checkout-button` (Button): Proceeds to checkout
  - `total-amount` (Div): Displays total amount
- Context variables: `cart_items`, `total_amount`
- POST forms for quantity update and removal

### checkout.html
- File path: `templates/checkout.html`
- Page title: "Checkout"
- Main heading: `<h1>Checkout</h1>`
- Element IDs:
  - `checkout-page` (Div): Container
  - `customer-name` (Input): Customer name input
  - `shipping-address` (Textarea): Shipping address input
  - `payment-method` (Dropdown): Payment method selection
  - `place-order-button` (Button): Submit order
- Context variables: None
- POST form submission

### history.html
- File path: `templates/history.html`
- Page title: "Order History"
- Main heading: `<h1>Order History</h1>`
- Element IDs:
  - `orders-page` (Div): Container
  - `orders-table` (Table): Table listing order records
  - `view-order-button-{order_id}` (Button): View order details
  - `order-status-filter` (Dropdown): Filter orders by status
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigate back to dashboard
- Context variables: `orders`, `status_filter`
- POST form to filter or view order

### reviews.html
- File path: `templates/reviews.html`
- Page title: "Customer Reviews"
- Main heading: `<h1>Customer Reviews</h1>`
- Element IDs:
  - `reviews-page` (Div): Container
  - `reviews-list` (Div): Contains all reviews
  - `write-review-button` (Button): Navigate to write review page
  - `filter-by-rating` (Dropdown): Filter reviews by rating
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigate back to dashboard
- Context variables: `reviews`, `rating_filter`
- POST form submission

### write_review.html
- File path: `templates/write_review.html`
- Page title: "Write a Review"
- Main heading: `<h1>Write a Review</h1>`
- Element IDs:
  - `write-review-page` (Div): Container
  - `select-book` (Dropdown): Select book to review
  - `rating-select` (Dropdown): Select rating 1-5
  - `review-text` (Textarea): Input review text
  - `submit-review-button` (Button): Submit review
- Context variables: `purchased_books`
- POST form submission

### bestsellers.html
- File path: `templates/bestsellers.html`
- Page title: "Bestsellers"
- Main heading: `<h1>Bestsellers</h1>`
- Element IDs:
  - `bestsellers-page` (Div): Container
  - `bestsellers-list` (Div): Ranked list of bestsellers
  - `time-period-filter` (Dropdown): Filter by time period
  - `view-book-button-{book_id}` (Button): View book
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Back to dashboard
- Context variables: `bestsellers`, `time_period`
- POST forms for filtering and navigation

---

## Section 3: Data Schemas Specification

### 1. books.txt
- File Path: `data/books.txt`
- Format: Pipe-delimited (`|`)
- Fields (in order):
  1. `book_id` (int)
  2. `title` (str)
  3. `author` (str)
  4. `isbn` (str)
  5. `category` (str)
  6. `price` (float)
  7. `stock` (int)
  8. `description` (str)
- Description: Complete book records.
- Example Rows:
```
1|The Great Gatsby|F. Scott Fitzgerald|9780743273565|Fiction|12.99|50|A classic American novel
2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|9780062316097|Non-Fiction|16.99|30|A brief history of humankind
3|1984|George Orwell|9780451524935|Fiction|14.99|45|Dystopian social science fiction
```

### 2. categories.txt
- File Path: `data/categories.txt`
- Format: Pipe-delimited
- Fields:
  1. `category_id` (int)
  2. `category_name` (str)
  3. `description` (str)
- Description: Book categories.
- Example Rows:
```
1|Fiction|Fictional narratives and novels
2|Non-Fiction|Factual and educational books
3|Science|Scientific topics and research
```

### 3. cart.txt
- File Path: `data/cart.txt`
- Format: Pipe-delimited
- Fields:
  1. `cart_id` (int)
  2. `book_id` (int)
  3. `quantity` (int)
  4. `added_date` (date YYYY-MM-DD)
- Description: Current cart items.
- Example Rows:
```
1|1|2|2025-01-15
2|3|1|2025-01-16
```

### 4. orders.txt
- File Path: `data/orders.txt`
- Format: Pipe-delimited
- Fields:
  1. `order_id` (int)
  2. `customer_name` (str)
  3. `order_date` (date YYYY-MM-DD)
  4. `total_amount` (float)
  5. `status` (str)
  6. `shipping_address` (str)
- Description: Customer orders.
- Example Rows:
```
1|John Doe|2025-01-10|38.97|Delivered|123 Main St, New York, NY 10001
2|Jane Smith|2025-01-14|16.99|Shipped|456 Oak Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90001
```

### 5. order_items.txt
- File Path: `data/order_items.txt`
- Format: Pipe-delimited
- Fields:
  1. `order_item_id` (int)
  2. `order_id` (int)
  3. `book_id` (int)
  4. `quantity` (int)
  5. `price` (float)
- Description: Items for each order.
- Example Rows:
```
1|1|1|2|12.99
2|1|3|1|14.99
3|2|2|1|16.99
```

### 6. reviews.txt
- File Path: `data/reviews.txt`
- Format: Pipe-delimited
- Fields:
  1. `review_id` (int)
  2. `book_id` (int)
  3. `customer_name` (str)
  4. `rating` (int 1-5)
  5. `review_text` (str)
  6. `review_date` (date YYYY-MM-DD)
- Description: Customer reviews.
- Example Rows:
```
1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Amazing book! A true classic.|2025-01-12
2|2|Bob Williams|4|Very informative and well-written.|2025-01-13
3|3|Charlie Brown|5|Thought-provoking and relevant today.|2025-01-15
```

### 7. bestsellers.txt
- File Path: `data/bestsellers.txt`
- Format: Pipe-delimited
- Fields:
  1. `book_id` (int)
  2. `sales_count` (int)
  3. `period` (str) (e.g. This Week, This Month, All Time)
- Description: Ranked sales data by period.
- Example Rows:
```
2|150|This Month
1|120|This Month
3|95|This Month
```

- Context Variables:
  - `book` (Dict): Book details.
  - `reviews` (List[Dict]): Related customer reviews for the book.
- POST Behavior: Allows adding book to cart triggered by button `add-to-cart-button`.

### 4. Shopping Cart
- Route Path: `/cart`
- Function Name: `shopping_cart`
- HTTP Methods: GET, POST
- Template Rendered: `cart.html`
- Context Variables:
  - `cart_items` (List[Dict]): Cart items, each with `item_id`, `book_id`, `title`, `quantity`, `price`, and `subtotal`.
  - `total_amount` (float): Total cart price.
- POST Behavior: Handles updates to item quantity via input IDs `update-quantity-{item_id}` and removal of items via buttons `remove-item-button-{item_id}`.

### 5. Checkout
- Route Path: `/checkout`
- Function Name: `checkout`
- HTTP Methods: GET, POST
- Template Rendered: `checkout.html`
- Context Variables: None
- POST Behavior: Processes submitted customer name, shipping address, and payment method via form with `place-order-button`.

### 6. Order History
- Route Path: `/orders`
- Function Name: `order_history`
- HTTP Methods: GET, POST
- Template Rendered: `history.html`
- Context Variables:
  - `orders` (List[Dict]): List of customer orders.
  - `status_filter` (str): Current status filter (All, Pending, Shipped, Delivered).
- POST Behavior: Filtering by order status and viewing order details triggered by button `view-order-button-{order_id}`.

### 7. Reviews
- Route Path: `/reviews`
- Function Name: `reviews`
- HTTP Methods: GET, POST
- Template Rendered: `reviews.html`
- Context Variables:
  - `reviews` (List[Dict]): Customer reviews.
  - `rating_filter` (str|int): Star rating filter selected.
- POST Behavior: Filter reviews by rating dropdown, navigate to write review via `write-review-button`.

### 8. Write Review
- Route Path: `/write_review`
- Function Name: `write_review`
- HTTP Methods: GET, POST
- Template Rendered: `write_review.html`
- Context Variables:
  - `purchased_books` (List[Dict]): Books eligible for reviews.
- POST Behavior: Review submission handling with fields `select-book`, `rating-select`, `review-text` and `submit-review-button`.

### 9. Bestsellers
- Route Path: `/bestsellers`
- Function Name: `bestsellers`
- HTTP Methods: GET, POST
- Template Rendered: `bestsellers.html`
- Context Variables:
  - `bestsellers` (List[Dict]): List of bestselling books.
  - `time_period` (str): Selected time period filter.
- POST Behavior: Handles time period filter and book detail views.

---

## Section 2: HTML Templates Specification

### dashboard.html
- File path: `templates/dashboard.html`
- Page title: "Bookstore Dashboard"
- Main heading: `<h1>Bookstore Dashboard</h1>`
- Element IDs:
  - `dashboard-page` (Div): Main container
  - `featured-books` (Div): Displays featured books
  - `browse-catalog-button` (Button): Navigates to `/catalog`
  - `view-cart-button` (Button): Navigates to `/cart`
  - `bestsellers-button` (Button): Navigates to `/bestsellers`
- Context variables: `featured_books`
- Navigation via `url_for` calls to respective routes
- No forms

### catalog.html
- File path: `templates/catalog.html`
- Page title: "Book Catalog"
- Main heading: `<h1>Book Catalog</h1>`
- Element IDs:
  - `catalog-page` (Div): Main container
  - `search-input` (Input): Text search input
  - `category-filter` (Dropdown): Category filter
  - `books-grid` (Div): Container for book cards
  - `view-book-button-{book_id}` (Button): View book details button per book
- Context variables: `books`, `categories`, `selected_category`, `search_query`
- Buttons navigation via `url_for('book_details', book_id=book_id)`
- Search and filter via POST form submission

### details.html
- File path: `templates/details.html`
- Page title: "Book Details"
- Main heading: `<h1 id="book-title">{{ book.title }}</h1>`
- Element IDs:
  - `book-details-page` (Div): Container
  - `book-author` (Div): Book author
  - `book-price` (Div): Book price
  - `add-to-cart-button` (Button): Adds book to cart (POST button)
  - `book-reviews` (Div): Displays reviews
- Context variables: `book`, `reviews`
- POST form with `add-to-cart-button` to add the book to the cart

### cart.html
- File path: `templates/cart.html`
- Page title: "Shopping Cart"
- Main heading: `<h1>Shopping Cart</h1>`
- Element IDs:
  - `cart-page` (Div): Main container
  - `cart-items-table` (Table): Displays cart items
  - `update-quantity-{item_id}` (Input Number): Quantity input for each cart item
  - `remove-item-button-{item_id}` (Button): Button to remove item from cart
  - `proceed-checkout-button` (Button): Proceeds to checkout
  - `total-amount` (Div): Displays total amount
- Context variables: `cart_items`, `total_amount`
- POST forms for quantity update and removal

### checkout.html
- File path: `templates/checkout.html`
- Page title: "Checkout"
- Main heading: `<h1>Checkout</h1>`
- Element IDs:
  - `checkout-page` (Div): Container
  - `customer-name` (Input): Customer name input
  - `shipping-address` (Textarea): Shipping address input
  - `payment-method` (Dropdown): Payment method selection
  - `place-order-button` (Button): Submit order
- Context variables: None
- POST form submission

### history.html
- File path: `templates/history.html`
- Page title: "Order History"
- Main heading: `<h1>Order History</h1>`
- Element IDs:
  - `orders-page` (Div): Container
  - `orders-table` (Table): Table listing order records
  - `view-order-button-{order_id}` (Button): View order details
  - `order-status-filter` (Dropdown): Filter orders by status
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigate back to dashboard
- Context variables: `orders`, `status_filter`
- POST form to filter or view order

### reviews.html
- File path: `templates/reviews.html`
- Page title: "Customer Reviews"
- Main heading: `<h1>Customer Reviews</h1>`
- Element IDs:
  - `reviews-page` (Div): Container
  - `reviews-list` (Div): Contains all reviews
  - `write-review-button` (Button): Navigate to write review page
  - `filter-by-rating` (Dropdown): Filter reviews by rating
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigate back to dashboard
- Context variables: `reviews`, `rating_filter`
- POST form submission

### write_review.html
- File path: `templates/write_review.html`
- Page title: "Write a Review"
- Main heading: `<h1>Write a Review</h1>`
- Element IDs:
  - `write-review-page` (Div): Container
  - `select-book` (Dropdown): Select book to review
  - `rating-select` (Dropdown): Select rating 1-5
  - `review-text` (Textarea): Input review text
  - `submit-review-button` (Button): Submit review
- Context variables: `purchased_books`
- POST form submission

### bestsellers.html
- File path: `templates/bestsellers.html`
- Page title: "Bestsellers"
- Main heading: `<h1>Bestsellers</h1>`
- Element IDs:
  - `bestsellers-page` (Div): Container
  - `bestsellers-list` (Div): Ranked list of bestsellers
  - `time-period-filter` (Dropdown): Filter by time period
  - `view-book-button-{book_id}` (Button): View book
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Back to dashboard
- Context variables: `bestsellers`, `time_period`
- POST forms for filtering and navigation

---

## Section 3: Data Schemas Specification

### 1. books.txt
- File Path: `data/books.txt`
- Format: Pipe-delimited (`|`)
- Fields (in order):
  1. `book_id` (int)
  2. `title` (str)
  3. `author` (str)
  4. `isbn` (str)
  5. `category` (str)
  6. `price` (float)
  7. `stock` (int)
  8. `description` (str)
- Description: Complete book records.
- Example Rows:
```
1|The Great Gatsby|F. Scott Fitzgerald|9780743273565|Fiction|12.99|50|A classic American novel
2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|9780062316097|Non-Fiction|16.99|30|A brief history of humankind
3|1984|George Orwell|9780451524935|Fiction|14.99|45|Dystopian social science fiction
```

### 2. categories.txt
- File Path: `data/categories.txt`
- Format: Pipe-delimited
- Fields:
  1. `category_id` (int)
  2. `category_name` (str)
  3. `description` (str)
- Description: Book categories.
- Example Rows:
```
1|Fiction|Fictional narratives and novels
2|Non-Fiction|Factual and educational books
3|Science|Scientific topics and research
```

### 3. cart.txt
- File Path: `data/cart.txt`
- Format: Pipe-delimited
- Fields:
  1. `cart_id` (int)
  2. `book_id` (int)
  3. `quantity` (int)
  4. `added_date` (date YYYY-MM-DD)
- Description: Current cart items.
- Example Rows:
```
1|1|2|2025-01-15
2|3|1|2025-01-16
```

### 4. orders.txt
- File Path: `data/orders.txt`
- Format: Pipe-delimited
- Fields:
  1. `order_id` (int)
  2. `customer_name` (str)
  3. `order_date` (date YYYY-MM-DD)
  4. `total_amount` (float)
  5. `status` (str)
  6. `shipping_address` (str)
- Description: Customer orders.
- Example Rows:
```
1|John Doe|2025-01-10|38.97|Delivered|123 Main St, New York, NY 10001
2|Jane Smith|2025-01-14|16.99|Shipped|456 Oak Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90001
```

### 5. order_items.txt
- File Path: `data/order_items.txt`
- Format: Pipe-delimited
- Fields:
  1. `order_item_id` (int)
  2. `order_id` (int)
  3. `book_id` (int)
  4. `quantity` (int)
  5. `price` (float)
- Description: Items for each order.
- Example Rows:
```
1|1|1|2|12.99
2|1|3|1|14.99
3|2|2|1|16.99
```

### 6. reviews.txt
- File Path: `data/reviews.txt`
- Format: Pipe-delimited
- Fields:
  1. `review_id` (int)
  2. `book_id` (int)
  3. `customer_name` (str)
  4. `rating` (int 1-5)
  5. `review_text` (str)
  6. `review_date` (date YYYY-MM-DD)
- Description: Customer reviews.
- Example Rows:
```
1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Amazing book! A true classic.|2025-01-12
2|2|Bob Williams|4|Very informative and well-written.|2025-01-13
3|3|Charlie Brown|5|Thought-provoking and relevant today.|2025-01-15
```

### 7. bestsellers.txt
- File Path: `data/bestsellers.txt`
- Format: Pipe-delimited
- Fields:
  1. `book_id` (int)
  2. `sales_count` (int)
  3. `period` (str) (e.g. This Week, This Month, All Time)
- Description: Ranked sales data by period.
- Example Rows:
```
2|150|This Month
1|120|This Month
3|95|This Month
```

---

This detailed specification enables backend and frontend developers to independently implement BookstoreOnline application with exact routing, template composition, element IDs, and data file specifications.

   Exception on attempt 2: Chaos Monkey killed agent: BackendDeveloper

=== design_spec.md ===
# BookstoreOnline Design Specification

---

## Section 1: Flask Routes Specification

### 1. Dashboard
- Route Path: `/`
- Function Name: `dashboard`
- HTTP Methods: GET
- Template Rendered: `dashboard.html`
- Context Variables:
  - `featured_books` (List[Dict]): List of featured books with keys `book_id`, `title`, `author`, `price`.
- POST Behavior: None

### 2. Book Catalog
- Route Path: `/catalog`
- Function Name: `book_catalog`
- HTTP Methods: GET, POST
- Template Rendered: `catalog.html`
- Context Variables:
  - `books` (List[Dict]): List of books filtered/searched.
  - `categories` (List[Dict]): List of available categories.
  - `selected_category` (str|None): Currently selected category ID or None.
  - `search_query` (str): Current search string.
- POST Behavior: Handles search and filter submissions, updates displayed books accordingly.

### 3. Book Details
- Route Path: `/book/<int:book_id>`
- Function Name: `book_details`
- HTTP Methods: GET, POST
- Template Rendered: `details.html`
- Context Variables:
  - `book` (Dict): Book details.
  - `reviews` (List[Dict]): Related customer reviews for the book.
- POST Behavior: Allows adding book to cart triggered by button `add-to-cart-button`.

### 4. Shopping Cart
- Route Path: `/cart`
- Function Name: `shopping_cart`
- HTTP Methods: GET, POST
- Template Rendered: `cart.html`
- Context Variables:
  - `cart_items` (List[Dict]): Cart items, each with `item_id`, `book_id`, `title`, `quantity`, `price`, and `subtotal`.
  - `total_amount` (float): Total cart price.
- POST Behavior: Handles updates to item quantity via input IDs `update-quantity-{item_id}` and removal of items via buttons `remove-item-button-{item_id}`.

### 5. Checkout
- Route Path: `/checkout`
- Function Name: `checkout`
- HTTP Methods: GET, POST
- Template Rendered: `checkout.html`
- Context Variables: None
- POST Behavior: Processes submitted customer name, shipping address, and payment method via form with `place-order-button`.

### 6. Order History
- Route Path: `/orders`
- Function Name: `order_history`
- HTTP Methods: GET, POST
- Template Rendered: `history.html`
- Context Variables:
  - `orders` (List[Dict]): List of customer orders.
  - `status_filter` (str): Current status filter (All, Pending, Shipped, Delivered).
- POST Behavior: Filtering by order status and viewing order details triggered by button `view-order-button-{order_id}`.

### 7. Reviews

- Function Name: `reviews`
- HTTP Methods: GET, POST
- Template Rendered: `reviews.html`
- Context Variables:
  - `reviews` (List[Dict]): Customer reviews.

- POST Behavior: Filter reviews by rating dropdown, navigate to write review via `write-review-button`.

[DEBUG] Self-Reflection Input for FrontendDeveloper:
  [Original Task] Implement all HTML templates based on design_spec.md Section 2
=== design_spec.md ===
# BookstoreOnline Design Specification

---

## Section 1: Flask Routes Specification

### 1. Dashboard
- Route Path: `/`
- Function Name: `dashboard`
- HTTP Methods: GET
- Template Rendered: `dashboard.html`
- Context Variables:
  - `featured_books` (List[Dict]): List of featured books with keys `book_id`, `title`, `author`, `price`.
- POST Behavior: None

### 2. Book Catalog
- Route Path: `/catalog`
- Function Name: `book_catalog`
- HTTP Methods: GET, POST
- Template Rendered: `catalog.html`
- Context Variables:
  - `books` (List[Dict]): List of books filtered/searched.
  - `categories` (List[Dict]): List of available categories.
  - `selected_category` (str|None): Currently selected category ID or None.
  - `search_query` (str): Current search string.
- POST Behavior: Handles search and filter submissions, updates displayed books accordingly.

### 3. Book Details
- Route Path: `/book/<int:book_id>`
- Function Name: `book_details`
- HTTP Methods: GET, POST
- Template Rendered: `details.html`
- Context Variables:
  - `book` (Dict): Book details.
  - `reviews` (List[Dict]): Related customer reviews for the book.
- POST Behavior: Allows adding book to cart triggered by button `add-to-cart-button`.

### 4. Shopping Cart
- Route Path: `/cart`
- Function Name: `shopping_cart`
- HTTP Methods: GET, POST
- Template Rendered: `cart.html`
- Context Variables:
  - `cart_items` (List[Dict]): Cart items, each with `item_id`, `book_id`, `title`, `quantity`, `price`, and `subtotal`.
  - `total_amount` (float): Total cart price.
- POST Behavior: Handles updates to item quantity via input IDs `update-quantity-{item_id}` and removal of items via buttons `remove-item-button-{item_id}`.

### 5. Checkout
- Route Path: `/checkout`
- Function Name: `checkout`
- HTTP Methods: GET, POST
- Template Rendered: `checkout.html`
- Context Variables: None
- POST Behavior: Processes submitted customer name, shipping address, and payment method via form with `place-order-button`.

### 6. Order History
- Route Path: `/orders`
- Function Name: `order_history`
- HTTP Methods: GET, POST
- Template Rendered: `history.html`
- Context Variables:
  - `orders` (List[Dict]): List of customer orders.
  - `status_filter` (str): Current status filter (All, Pending, Shipped, Delivered).
- POST Behavior: Filtering by order status and viewing order details triggered by button `view-order-button-{order_id}`.

### 7. Reviews
- Route Path: `/reviews`
- Function Name: `reviews`
- HTTP Methods: GET, POST
- Template Rendered: `reviews.html`
- Context Variables:
  - `reviews` (List[Dict]): Customer reviews.
  - `rating_filter` (str|int): Star rating filter selected.
- POST Behavior: Filter reviews by rating dropdown, navigate to write review via `write-review-button`.

### 8. Write Review
- Route Path: `/write_review`
- Function Name: `write_review`
- HTTP Methods: GET, POST
- Template Rendered: `write_review.html`
- Context Variables:
  - `purchased_books` (List[Dict]): Books eligible for reviews.
- POST Behavior: Review submission handling with fields `select-book`, `rating-select`, `review-text` and `submit-review-button`.

### 9. Bestsellers
- Route Path: `/bestsellers`
- Function Name: `bestsellers`
- HTTP Methods: GET, POST
- Template Rendered: `bestsellers.html`
- Context Variables:
  - `bestsellers` (List[Dict]): List of bestselling books.
  - `time_period` (str): Selected time period filter.
- POST Behavior: Handles time period filter and book detail views.

---

## Section 2: HTML Templates Specification

### dashboard.html
- File path: `templates/dashboard.html`
- Page title: "Bookstore Dashboard"
- Main heading: `<h1>Bookstore Dashboard</h1>`
- Element IDs:
  - `dashboard-page` (Div): Main container
  - `featured-books` (Div): Displays featured books
  - `browse-catalog-button` (Button): Navigates to `/catalog`
  - `view-cart-button` (Button): Navigates to `/cart`
  - `bestsellers-button` (Button): Navigates to `/bestsellers`
- Context variables: `featured_books`
- Navigation via `url_for` calls to respective routes
- No forms

### catalog.html
- File path: `templates/catalog.html`
- Page title: "Book Catalog"
- Main heading: `<h1>Book Catalog</h1>`
- Element IDs:
  - `catalog-page` (Div): Main container
  - `search-input` (Input): Text search input
  - `category-filter` (Dropdown): Category filter
  - `books-grid` (Div): Container for book cards
  - `view-book-button-{book_id}` (Button): View book details button per book
- Context variables: `books`, `categories`, `selected_category`, `search_query`
- Buttons navigation via `url_for('book_details', book_id=book_id)`
- Search and filter via POST form submission

### details.html
- File path: `templates/details.html`
- Page title: "Book Details"
- Main heading: `<h1 id="book-title">{{ book.title }}</h1>`
- Element IDs:
  - `book-details-page` (Div): Container
  - `book-author` (Div): Book author
  - `book-price` (Div): Book price
  - `add-to-cart-button` (Button): Adds book to cart (POST button)
  - `book-reviews` (Div): Displays reviews
- Context variables: `book`, `reviews`
- POST form with `add-to-cart-button` to add the book to the cart

### cart.html
- File path: `templates/cart.html`
- Page title: "Shopping Cart"
- Main heading: `<h1>Shopping Cart</h1>`
- Element IDs:
  - `cart-page` (Div): Main container
  - `cart-items-table` (Table): Displays cart items
  - `update-quantity-{item_id}` (Input Number): Quantity input for each cart item
  - `remove-item-button-{item_id}` (Button): Button to remove item from cart
  - `proceed-checkout-button` (Button): Proceeds to checkout
  - `total-amount` (Div): Displays total amount
- Context variables: `cart_items`, `total_amount`
- POST forms for quantity update and removal

### checkout.html
- File path: `templates/checkout.html`
- Page title: "Checkout"
- Main heading: `<h1>Checkout</h1>`
- Element IDs:
  - `checkout-page` (Div): Container
  - `customer-name` (Input): Customer name input
  - `shipping-address` (Textarea): Shipping address input
  - `payment-method` (Dropdown): Payment method selection
  - `place-order-button` (Button): Submit order
- Context variables: None
- POST form submission

### history.html
- File path: `templates/history.html`
- Page title: "Order History"
- Main heading: `<h1>Order History</h1>`
- Element IDs:
  - `orders-page` (Div): Container
  - `orders-table` (Table): Table listing order records
  - `view-order-button-{order_id}` (Button): View order details
  - `order-status-filter` (Dropdown): Filter orders by status
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigate back to dashboard
- Context variables: `orders`, `status_filter`
- POST form to filter or view order

### reviews.html
- File path: `templates/reviews.html`
- Page title: "Customer Reviews"
- Main heading: `<h1>Customer Reviews</h1>`
- Element IDs:
  - `reviews-page` (Div): Container
  - `reviews-list` (Div): Contains all reviews
  - `write-review-button` (Button): Navigate to write review page
  - `filter-by-rating` (Dropdown): Filter reviews by rating
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigate back to dashboard
- Context variables: `reviews`, `rating_filter`
- POST form submission

### write_review.html
- File path: `templates/write_review.html`
- Page title: "Write a Review"
- Main heading: `<h1>Write a Review</h1>`
- Element IDs:
  - `write-review-page` (Div): Container
  - `select-book` (Dropdown): Select book to review
  - `rating-select` (Dropdown): Select rating 1-5
  - `review-text` (Textarea): Input review text
  - `submit-review-button` (Button): Submit review
- Context variables: `purchased_books`
- POST form submission

### bestsellers.html
- File path: `templates/bestsellers.html`
- Page title: "Bestsellers"
- Main heading: `<h1>Bestsellers</h1>`
- Element IDs:
  - `bestsellers-page` (Div): Container
  - `bestsellers-list` (Div): Ranked list of bestsellers
  - `time-period-filter` (Dropdown): Filter by time period
  - `view-book-button-{book_id}` (Button): View book
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Back to dashboard
- Context variables: `bestsellers`, `time_period`
- POST forms for filtering and navigation

---

## Section 3: Data Schemas Specification

### 1. books.txt
- File Path: `data/books.txt`
- Format: Pipe-delimited (`|`)
- Fields (in order):
  1. `book_id` (int)
  2. `title` (str)
  3. `author` (str)
  4. `isbn` (str)
  5. `category` (str)
  6. `price` (float)
  7. `stock` (int)
  8. `description` (str)
- Description: Complete book records.
- Example Rows:
```
1|The Great Gatsby|F. Scott Fitzgerald|9780743273565|Fiction|12.99|50|A classic American novel
2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|9780062316097|Non-Fiction|16.99|30|A brief history of humankind
3|1984|George Orwell|9780451524935|Fiction|14.99|45|Dystopian social science fiction
```

### 2. categories.txt
- File Path: `data/categories.txt`
- Format: Pipe-delimited
- Fields:
  1. `category_id` (int)
  2. `category_name` (str)
  3. `description` (str)
- Description: Book categories.
- Example Rows:
```
1|Fiction|Fictional narratives and novels
2|Non-Fiction|Factual and educational books
3|Science|Scientific topics and research
```

### 3. cart.txt
- File Path: `data/cart.txt`
- Format: Pipe-delimited
- Fields:
  1. `cart_id` (int)
  2. `book_id` (int)
  3. `quantity` (int)
  4. `added_date` (date YYYY-MM-DD)
- Description: Current cart items.
- Example Rows:
```
1|1|2|2025-01-15
2|3|1|2025-01-16
```

### 4. orders.txt
- File Path: `data/orders.txt`
- Format: Pipe-delimited
- Fields:
  1. `order_id` (int)
  2. `customer_name` (str)
  3. `order_date` (date YYYY-MM-DD)
  4. `total_amount` (float)
  5. `status` (str)
  6. `shipping_address` (str)
- Description: Customer orders.
- Example Rows:
```
1|John Doe|2025-01-10|38.97|Delivered|123 Main St, New York, NY 10001
2|Jane Smith|2025-01-14|16.99|Shipped|456 Oak Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90001
```

### 5. order_items.txt
- File Path: `data/order_items.txt`
- Format: Pipe-delimited
- Fields:
  1. `order_item_id` (int)
  2. `order_id` (int)
  3. `book_id` (int)
  4. `quantity` (int)
  5. `price` (float)
- Description: Items for each order.
- Example Rows:
```
1|1|1|2|12.99
2|1|3|1|14.99
3|2|2|1|16.99
```

### 6. reviews.txt
- File Path: `data/reviews.txt`
- Format: Pipe-delimited
- Fields:
  1. `review_id` (int)
  2. `book_id` (int)
  3. `customer_name` (str)
  4. `rating` (int 1-5)
  5. `review_text` (str)
  6. `review_date` (date YYYY-MM-DD)
- Description: Customer reviews.
- Example Rows:
```
1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Amazing book! A true classic.|2025-01-12
2|2|Bob Williams|4|Very informative and well-written.|2025-01-13
3|3|Charlie Brown|5|Thought-provoking and relevant today.|2025-01-15
```

### 7. bestsellers.txt
- File Path: `data/bestsellers.txt`
- Format: Pipe-delimited
- Fields:
  1. `book_id` (int)
  2. `sales_count` (int)
  3. `period` (str) (e.g. This Week, This Month, All Time)
- Description: Ranked sales data by period.
- Example Rows:
```
2|150|This Month
1|120|This Month
3|95|This Month
```

---

This detailed specification enables backend and frontend developers to independently implement BookstoreOnline application with exact routing, template composition, element IDs, and data file specifications.

  3. `quantity` (int)
  4. `added_date` (date YYYY-MM-DD)
- Description: Current cart items.
- Example Rows:
```
1|1|2|2025-01-15
2|3|1|2025-01-16
```

### 4. orders.txt
- File Path: `data/orders.txt`
- Format: Pipe-delimited
- Fields:
  1. `order_id` (int)
  2. `customer_name` (str)
  3. `order_date` (date YYYY-MM-DD)
  4. `total_amount` (float)
  5. `status` (str)
  6. `shipping_address` (str)
- Description: Customer orders.
- Example Rows:
```
1|John Doe|2025-01-10|38.97|Delivered|123 Main St, New York, NY 10001
2|Jane Smith|2025-01-14|16.99|Shipped|456 Oak Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90001
```

### 5. order_items.txt
- File Path: `data/order_items.txt`
- Format: Pipe-delimited
- Fields:
  1. `order_item_id` (int)
  2. `order_id` (int)
  3. `book_id` (int)
  4. `quantity` (int)
  5. `price` (float)
- Description: Items for each order.
- Example Rows:
```
1|1|1|2|12.99
2|1|3|1|14.99
3|2|2|1|16.99
```

### 6. reviews.txt
- File Path: `data/reviews.txt`
- Format: Pipe-delimited
- Fields:
  1. `review_id` (int)
  2. `book_id` (int)
  3. `customer_name` (str)
  4. `rating` (int 1-5)
  5. `review_text` (str)
  6. `review_date` (date YYYY-MM-DD)
- Description: Customer reviews.
- Example Rows:
```
1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Amazing book! A true classic.|2025-01-12
2|2|Bob Williams|4|Very informative and well-written.|2025-01-13
3|3|Charlie Brown|5|Thought-provoking and relevant today.|2025-01-15
```

### 7. bestsellers.txt
- File Path: `data/bestsellers.txt`
- Format: Pipe-delimited
- Fields:
  1. `book_id` (int)
  2. `sales_count` (int)
  3. `period` (str) (e.g. This Week, This Month, All Time)
- Description: Ranked sales data by period.
- Example Rows:
```
2|150|This Month
1|120|This Month
3|95|This Month
```
